zh-tw.title: 減肥語錄
zh-tw.description: 為每一個說了三百次「明天開始」的人準備——精選最有共感的減肥金句、健身房厭世語錄、體重計與鏡子的三方說法，以及春夏前夕最誠實的內心獨白

en.title: Diet Quotes
en.description: For everyone who has announced 'starting tomorrow' three hundred times — the most relatable diet quotes, gym-floor confessions, the lies your scale tells, and the most honest pre-summer monologues you'll ever read

items.sourceNote: 經典「我愛食物，脂肪愛我」三角戀格式重寫

zh-tw.content:
世界上最痛的三角戀，不是電視劇演的那種，
是我愛食物，食物愛脂肪，脂肪深情地愛著我。

這段三人關係非常穩定，從來沒人想分手。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給說了三百次「明天開始減肥」的朋友——他會邊吃宵夜邊轉發
variations: 第二季預告：我們三個決定下週去吃火鍋慶祝交往一週年。

en.content:
The most painful love triangle in the world isn't the one on TV.
It's me loving food, food loving fat, and fat loving me back deeply.

The three of us are extremely stable. Nobody has ever wanted to break up.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who has announced 'starting tomorrow' three hundred times — they'll forward it mid-snack
variations: Season two preview: the three of us are celebrating our one-year anniversary at a hot pot place next week.

items.sourceNote: 體重計、鏡子、相簿三方說法格式，原創語錄

zh-tw.content:
體重計告訴你：你又重了 0.3 公斤。
鏡子告訴你：你看起來跟昨天一樣。
手機相簿告訴你：你三年前長這樣。

三個來源，三個版本，沒有一個讓你想出門。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在減肥週的星期三傳給健身房戰友，順便配一張早餐照
variations: 更新：第四個來源是最近兩週每天經過的便利商店店員，他開始記得你買的甜點口味。

en.content:
The scale says: you're 0.3 kg heavier today.
The mirror says: you look exactly the same as yesterday.
Your camera roll says: this is what you looked like three years ago.

Three sources, three versions, zero motivation to leave the house.
en.editorNote: Send to your gym buddy on Wednesday of diet week, ideally paired with a breakfast photo
variations: Update: a fourth source is the convenience store clerk who now remembers which dessert you order.

items.sourceNote: 「I've been on a diet for weeks, all I've lost is 21 days」格式重寫

zh-tw.content:
減肥第 30 天：我已經成功瘦了 30 天的時間。
體重沒變，但我擁有了 30 天減肥經歷。

下次填履歷的時候，這應該可以放在「持續性表現」那一欄。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合月初貼在限動，搭配一張你最近吃的便當
variations: 延伸版：第 60 天我會升級成「資深減肥候選人」，第 90 天直接申請永久會員。

en.content:
Day 30 of my diet: I have successfully lost 30 days.
My weight hasn't changed, but I now have 30 days of dieting experience.

Next time I update my résumé, this should go under 'sustained performance'.
en.editorNote: Perfect for an end-of-month story post, ideally with a photo of your latest takeout
variations: Day 60 unlocks the 'senior diet candidate' tier. Day 90 is lifetime membership.

items.sourceNote: 「Every minute on that treadmill is one minute closer to pizza」原典重寫

zh-tw.content:
在跑步機上每多跑一分鐘，
你就離冰箱裡那塊披薩更近了一分鐘。

所以說健身的本質，是讓食物變得更值得。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給「運動完一定要吃比平常多」的朋友——他會說這就是科學
variations: 進階版：心率拉到 160，是因為我在想晚餐到底要吃滷味還是炸雞。

en.content:
Every extra minute on the treadmill
is one minute closer to the slice of pizza in the fridge.

So really, the point of exercise is to make food taste more deserved.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who eats more *after* working out — they'll call this scientific consensus
variations: Pro version: my heart rate hit 160 because I was deciding between fried chicken and ramen for dinner.

items.sourceNote: 「I'm on a seafood diet. I see food and I eat it.」經典英文諧音梗重寫並轉成中文版

zh-tw.content:
我最近開始吃「海鮮餐」。
看到食物（see food），我就吃。

名字聽起來很健康，效果非常顯著——體重很穩定地往上長。
zh-tw.editorNote: 英文諧音梗轉成中文版本，傳給看得懂的朋友會直接笑出來
variations: 附帶說明：醫師建議我擴大菜單，所以現在還加上「夜食餐」——晚上看到食物就吃。

en.content:
I'm on the seafood diet.
I see food, I eat it.

The name sounds healthy. The results are very consistent — my weight goes up on a steady curve.
en.editorNote: The classic. Send to anyone who has ever 'started Monday' — they'll quote it back at you forever
variations: Doctor suggested I expand the menu. I'm now also on the night-food diet: I see food at night, I eat it.

items.sourceNote: 教練激勵語的反轉自嘲格式，原創語錄

zh-tw.content:
教練說：「你今天比昨天的自己更強。」
我心想：那是因為昨天的我下班後吃了三個飯糰。

強的不是我，是飯糰的能量還沒消耗完。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給認真上私人教練的朋友，他會立刻回你「太真實」
variations: 下集：教練說我進步神速，我說那是因為我午餐吃了排骨便當加焢肉飯——這叫做超載原則。

en.content:
My trainer said, "You're stronger than the version of you from yesterday."
I thought, that's because yesterday-me ate three rice balls after work.

It's not me being stronger. It's the rice balls' energy that hasn't burned off yet.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who pays for a personal trainer — they'll reply 'too accurate' instantly
variations: Sequel: trainer said I'm progressing fast. That's because I had a double-portion lunch — call it the overload principle.

items.sourceNote: 「世界上最動聽的三個字」格式經典款，重寫加場景

zh-tw.content:
世界上最動聽的三個字，
不是「我愛你」，
是「你瘦了」。

哪怕說的人完全沒看清楚、根本沒戴眼鏡——
沒關係，我相信他。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合搭配早餐沙拉的限動，傳遞給每天試圖維持的人
variations: 延伸：世界上最殘忍的五個字是「你最近圓了」——說的人通常是你媽。

en.content:
The most beautiful three words in the world
aren't 'I love you'.
They're 'you look thinner'.

Even if the person is squinting from across the room and not wearing their glasses —
I'll take it. I believe in them.
en.editorNote: Pair with a salad story, send to anyone holding the line this week
variations: Bonus: the most brutal four words are 'you've filled out' — and they're almost always from your mom.

items.sourceNote: 深夜放棄宵夜的廢話文學格式，原創

zh-tw.content:
如果你今天克制住沒吃宵夜，
那很好，明天還有 24 小時可以反悔。
zh-tw.editorNote: 短到可以當 Threads 一句脆文，深夜配一張關燈的廚房照
variations: 進階版：克制力不是用完就沒，而是預支——明天的我會還的。

en.content:
If you managed to skip the midnight snack tonight,
that's great. You still have 24 hours tomorrow to change your mind.
en.editorNote: Short enough for a single-line post — pair with a lights-off kitchen photo
variations: Pro version: willpower isn't spent — it's borrowed. Tomorrow-me will pay it back.

items.sourceNote: 「我不是胖只是...」自我合理化格式，原創語錄

zh-tw.content:
我不是胖，
我只是把過去三年的快樂，
用最直接的方式儲存在身體裡。

這叫做有形資產，比定存還可靠。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給講話自帶幽默濾鏡的朋友，他會直接拿來當大頭貼下面的簽名
variations: 補充說明：別人在做斷捨離，我在做資產配置——快樂是不能斷捨的。

en.content:
I'm not fat.
I just chose to store the last three years of happiness
in the most direct way possible — on my body.

This is called a tangible asset. More reliable than a savings account.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend with a built-in humor filter — this one ends up as their bio caption
variations: Disclosure: while others are decluttering, I'm doing asset allocation — and happiness is non-disposable.

items.sourceNote: 比基尼季 / 春夏焦慮自嘲，原創語錄；台灣夏天毛巾／浴袍場景在地化

zh-tw.content:
夏天還有兩個月。
我看著鏡子，鏡子看著我，
我們安靜地達成共識：今年再放它一年。

反正泳池有大毛巾，海邊有大浴巾，溫泉有大浴袍——
台灣的夏天，本來就是給聰明人準備的。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每年五月才開始焦慮的朋友——他會回你：明年再認真
variations: 更新：去年穿的那件比基尼，今年我打算直接送給未來會更有自信的自己——可能在 2030 年左右。

en.content:
Two months until summer.
I look at the mirror, the mirror looks at me,
and quietly we reach the same conclusion: we'll let it go for one more year.

The pool has big towels. The beach has big wraps. The hot spring has big robes —
Taiwan's summer was clearly designed for smart people.
en.editorNote: Send to anyone whose annual swimsuit anxiety starts in May — they'll reply 'next year for real'
variations: Update: I'm donating last year's swimsuit to a more confident future me. ETA: roughly 2030.

items.sourceNote: 辦健身房會員 vs 真實使用率落差格式，原創語錄

zh-tw.content:
辦健身房會員的當下：我接下來每天都會來。
第一週：來了三天，已經快感動哭。
第二週：開始覺得健身房離家有點遠。
第三週：研究退費條件。
第四週：用會員卡刷捷運比較順手。

會員卡最大的功能，原來是讓自己定期想起「我曾經有過動力」。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合月底自我檢討時傳給健身房戰友——他會把退費連結傳給你
variations: 後續：第六個月發現會員到期的那一天，我才真正流下了汗——是冷汗。

en.content:
The day I signed up: I'm going to come every single day.
Week 1: Made it three times. Almost cried with pride.
Week 2: Realized the gym is kind of far from home.
Week 3: Researched the refund policy.
Week 4: The membership card works better as a transit card.

Turns out the real function of a gym membership is to remind yourself, monthly, that you once had motivation.
en.editorNote: Save for the end-of-month reflection text to your gym buddy — they'll send the refund link
variations: Postscript: month six, the day my membership expired was the day I finally broke a sweat — a cold one.

items.sourceNote: 婚禮季衝刺減肥計畫的拖延循環，原創語錄；五月婚季在地化

zh-tw.content:
好朋友五月結婚。
二月我說：還有三個月，可以慢慢來。
三月我說：還有兩個月，下週開始。
四月我說：還有一個月，從今天開始。
五月我說：拍照站後排就好了。

人生很多事情，是這樣循環解決的。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給今年要當伴娘伴郎的朋友——他絕對在這四個月某一格認出自己
variations: 第二集：婚禮當天我穿了寬鬆禮服，宣稱這是「設計師款」，然後吃了三輪自助餐。

en.content:
A close friend is getting married in May.
February: three months to go, no rush.
March: two months to go, starting next week.
April: one month to go, starting today.
May: I'll just stand in the back row for photos.

A lot of life problems get solved exactly like this.
en.editorNote: Send to anyone in this year's bridal party — they'll recognize themselves in at least one of those months
variations: Sequel: I wore a loose dress to the wedding, declared it 'designer cut', and went through the buffet line three times.

items.sourceNote: 計算熱量但忽略沙拉醬／配料的自欺格式，原創語錄

zh-tw.content:
我有在認真算熱量喔。
沙拉的菜葉、雞胸的克數、藜麥的碗大小——通通記得清清楚楚。

至於沙拉醬、芝麻、堅果、蜂蜜芥末，
那是「裝飾」，裝飾不算熱量，這是常識。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給「我吃得很健康為什麼還是沒瘦」的朋友——他會立刻回想起昨晚的醬料
variations: 附註：起司也是裝飾。麵包屑也是裝飾。配菜的薯條，是給沙拉壯壯膽的。

en.content:
I track my calories very carefully.
Lettuce grams, chicken breast grams, quinoa bowl size — all logged.

The dressing, the sesame, the nuts, the honey mustard?
Those are 'garnish'. Garnish doesn't count. Common knowledge.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who insists 'but I eat so healthy' — they'll instantly remember last night's dressing
variations: Footnote: cheese is garnish. Croutons are garnish. The fries on the side are emotional support for the salad.

items.sourceNote: 「I'm into fitness. Fittin' this pizza in my mouth」經典諧音梗重寫，加台灣在地食物

zh-tw.content:
有人問我有沒有在做「健身」。
我說有啊，我每天都在「堅實」地把鹹酥雞塞進嘴裡。

發音差一點，意思差很多，但動作真的很像。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每次運動完都要來一份鹹酥雞慶祝的朋友——他會說這叫補充蛋白質
variations: 升級版：今天我做了複合式訓練——一邊看健身影片，一邊把整盒披薩塞進嘴裡。

en.content:
Someone asked if I'm into fitness.
I said yes — I'm fittin' this whole slice of pizza into my mouth right now.

The spelling is slightly different. The motion is exactly the same.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who rewards every workout with fried chicken — they'll call it 'protein replenishment'
variations: Pro upgrade: today I did compound training — watching a fitness video while fitting an entire pizza box into my mouth.

items.sourceNote: 「lunge + crunch = lunch」運動術語雙關重寫，中文版改用本地化動作命名

zh-tw.content:
我最喜歡的運動是一個複合動作：
一半是弓箭步，一半是仰臥起坐——我把它命名為「午餐」。

每天中午做一次，效果非常顯著，肚子真的會變大。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給辦公室一起訂便當的同事——午休前發效果最好
variations: 進階版：晚上加做一次「宵餐」，動作一模一樣，只是搭配的是滷味跟啤酒。

en.content:
My favorite exercise is a compound move:
half lunge, half crunch — I call it 'lunch'.

I do one every day at noon. The results are dramatic. My stomach really does get bigger.
en.editorNote: Send to the coworkers in your lunch-order group chat — best delivered five minutes before noon
variations: Advanced version: I add a second rep at midnight called 'munch' — same motion, just paired with beer and leftovers.

items.sourceNote: 「If you ate it in the car before you get home, it never existed」熱量會計學原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
減肥熱量會計學第一條：
站著吃的不算，走路吃的不算，車上吃的不算，凌晨吃的不算。

結論：只要不坐下來、不開燈、不在餐桌前——你今天等於沒吃。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每次回家前都先解決一份雞排的朋友——他會說這是減壓
variations: 補充條款：別人請的不算，試吃的不算，慶祝的不算，療癒的不算。一年下來，我幾乎沒吃過任何東西。

en.content:
Rule one of diet accounting:
If you eat it standing up, it doesn't count. Walking, doesn't count. In the car, doesn't count. After midnight, doesn't count.

Conclusion: as long as you don't sit down, don't turn on the lights, and don't go near the dining table — you technically haven't eaten today.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who finishes a fried chicken combo in the car before walking in the door — they call it 'decompression'
variations: Amendment: anything someone else paid for doesn't count. Free samples, celebrations, emotional support snacks — none of it counts. By that math I've barely eaten all year.

items.sourceNote: 「salad for lunch then ate the pantry / overactive knife and fork」原典擴寫，加在地化夜貓場景

zh-tw.content:
中午我認真吃了一份沙拉。
回家後，我把廚櫃從上到下清了一輪、把冰箱從左到右掃了一遍。

醫生說我沒有什麼大問題，
只是「刀叉過動症」——病發時間通常在晚上九點之後。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合貼在限動，搭配一張沙拉照跟一張零食袋的併排對比
variations: 病例追蹤：今天症狀加重，連雞蛋糕的紙袋都沒放過。

en.content:
I had a salad for lunch like a responsible adult.
Then I came home and cleared the pantry top to bottom and the fridge left to right.

The doctor said there's nothing seriously wrong with me —
just an overactive knife and fork. Symptoms usually flare up after 9 p.m.
en.editorNote: Pair with a side-by-side story: salad photo on the left, empty snack wrapper on the right
variations: Case update: tonight's flare-up was severe. I ate the snack, the wrapper crumbs, and then briefly considered the wrapper itself.

items.sourceNote: 「stressed spelled backwards is desserts」經典字謎梗重寫，加台灣甜點場景

zh-tw.content:
「壓力」反過來唸，是「力壓」——力壓我去買甜點。
英文也一樣，stressed 倒過來是 desserts。

這不是巧合，這是宇宙在告訴你：今天的雞蛋糕、芋圓、車輪餅，是合理開銷。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每次加班結束就直奔甜點店的同事——他會立刻把這當成請客的理由
variations: 進階解讀：壓力越大，甜點越多種，這是物理學的能量守恆。
今日結論：與其抗壓，不如抗糖；但既然抗糖也很有壓力，那就回到原點。

en.content:
'Stressed' spelled backwards is 'desserts'.

This isn't a coincidence. The universe is telling you that tonight's brownie, ice cream, and second brownie are a legitimate operational expense.
en.editorNote: Send to the coworker who heads straight to the dessert counter after every late shift — they'll use this to justify a round for the office
variations: Advanced reading: the more stress, the more dessert categories required. This is just energy conservation, but for emotions.
Today's conclusion: instead of fighting stress, fight sugar. But fighting sugar is also stressful, so we're back where we started.

items.sourceNote: 「I'm just a girl standing in front of a salad asking it to be a donut」格式重寫，加台式早餐場景

zh-tw.content:
我只是一個普通的人，
站在沙拉前面，誠懇地請求它，
變成一份蛋餅加大冰奶。

它沒有答應。但每天早上，我還是會問一次。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每天早餐都在沙拉跟蛋餅之間天人交戰的朋友——他會回你「我今天輸了」
variations: 升級版：站在沙拉前面，請求它變成燒餅油條配豆漿。連續三十天，沙拉一次都沒有讓步。

en.content:
I'm just a person,
standing in front of a salad,
sincerely asking it to become a breakfast egg crepe with iced milk tea.

It has never said yes. But every morning, I ask again.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who agonizes between salad and pancakes every single morning — they'll reply 'I lost today'
variations: Upgraded version: standing in front of a salad, asking it to become a sausage McMuffin. Thirty days running. The salad has never once budged.

items.sourceNote: 「gained and lost the same ten pounds, cellulite has déjà vu」格式重寫，加台灣公斤單位

zh-tw.content:
我已經在同樣的三公斤裡，
胖了又瘦、瘦了又胖，輪迴了五年。

現在連我的肉都產生既視感——
它每次回來都會說：「啊，我又來了。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合年初年尾自我盤點時發限動，搭配一張體重計螢幕模糊照
variations: 醫生說這叫「彈性體脂」，我說這叫「肉的會員制」——它每年自動續約。

en.content:
I've gained and lost the same three kilos
so many times over five years
that my cellulite now has déjà vu.

Every time it comes back, it says, 'oh, here we are again.'
en.editorNote: Perfect for a New Year or year-end reflection story, paired with a slightly blurry photo of the scale screen
variations: The doctor calls this 'flexible body fat'. I call it a loyalty program — my fat auto-renews every year.

items.sourceNote: 「the second day of a diet is always easier than the first, by then you're off it」經典格式重寫，加台灣早餐場景

zh-tw.content:
減肥的第二天，永遠比第一天輕鬆。
因為到了第二天，你已經放棄了。

所以我建議大家直接從第二天開始——這是最有效率的減肥法。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每個禮拜一都信誓旦旦要減肥的朋友——他禮拜二就會回你「我已經到第二天了」
variations: 進階版：第三天的人是傳說中的存在，目前我這輩子只見過兩個，他們現在都當教練。

en.content:
The second day of a diet is always easier than the first.
By day two, you've already quit.

So I recommend starting on day two directly. It's the most efficient diet method ever invented.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who solemnly restarts their diet every Monday — by Tuesday they'll text 'made it to day two'
variations: Advanced tier: people who reach day three are mythical creatures. I've only met two in my life. They're both personal trainers now.

items.sourceNote: 「calories are creatures in your closet that sew your clothes tighter at night」原典重寫加在地化

zh-tw.content:
熱量是住在你衣櫃裡的小生物。
你睡覺的時候，牠們會悄悄把你的牛仔褲腰圍縫緊一點。

這就是為什麼那條本來合身的褲子，今年穿起來像在跟你討債。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合冬末春初翻出舊衣服試穿的時候發限動，配一張褲頭扣不上的特寫
variations: 後續報導：經過調查，這些小生物的工作時數是越夜越長，旺季落在農曆年後到清明前。

en.content:
Calories are tiny creatures that live in your closet.
While you sleep, they quietly take in the waistband of your jeans, just a little.

That's why the pants that fit you last year now feel like they're trying to collect a debt.
en.editorNote: Pair with a close-up of a stuck zipper, post-holiday — perfect for that 'why don't these fit anymore' story
variations: Investigation update: these creatures work overtime hours, with peak season running from January through March.

items.sourceNote: 腿日後爬樓梯如最終 Boss 戰格式，原創改寫，加台灣捷運站場景

zh-tw.content:
練完腿日的隔天，捷運站的樓梯就是最終 Boss。
上樓梯需要勇氣，下樓梯需要信仰，看到電扶梯壞掉需要心理諮商。

旁邊的阿嬤超車過去的時候，我輕聲對自己說：沒事，我們走的不是同一條路。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給昨天剛練完深蹲的朋友——他會邊走邊回你「我現在就在樓梯間休息」
variations: 升級劇情：第三天我已經放棄樓梯，改用滑步前進——同事以為我在表演默劇。

en.content:
The day after leg day, the subway stairs become the final boss.
Going up requires courage. Going down requires faith. A broken escalator requires therapy.

When a grandma overtakes me on the steps, I whisper to myself: it's fine, we're not on the same journey.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who squatted yesterday — they'll reply mid-stairwell, 'currently sitting on step seven'
variations: Sequel: by day three I've given up on stairs entirely and started shuffle-walking. Coworkers think I'm doing a mime routine.

items.sourceNote: 外送 app 演算法太懂你的自嘲格式，原創語錄；台灣外送平台情境化

zh-tw.content:
外送 app 比我家人還了解我。
它知道我週三會點鹹酥雞，週五會點手搖，下雨天直接跳過沙拉直接推薦麻辣鍋。

我刪 app 三天，它寄信給我說：「想你了，回來吧，今天免運。」

你看，連演算法都不相信我能堅持。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每天嫌棄自己又繼續滑外送的朋友——他會邊滑邊轉發給你
variations: 後續：我重新下載 app，演算法立刻把上次沒點完的訂單恢復——它連我猶豫的東西都記得。

en.content:
The food delivery app knows me better than my family.
It knows I order fried chicken on Wednesdays, bubble tea on Fridays, and skips the salad section entirely on rainy days to recommend hot pot.

I deleted the app for three days. It emailed me: 'we miss you. Free delivery today.'

Even the algorithm doesn't believe I can stick to this.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who hates themselves and keeps scrolling delivery anyway — they'll forward it back mid-scroll
variations: Follow-up: I reinstalled the app. The algorithm instantly restored the order I abandoned last time — it even remembered the items I was hovering over.

items.sourceNote: 新買的運動服取代運動本身的拖延格式，原創語錄；台灣本地運動品牌購物文化

zh-tw.content:
我買了一整套新的運動服：吸濕排汗的緊身褲、鯊魚褲、機能背心、限定配色運動鞋。
總共花了八千二，總共穿出門過：零次。

它們現在整齊地掛在衣櫥裡，像在提醒我：「老闆，押金要不要也順便繳一下？」
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每次運動低潮就靠購物自我激勵的朋友——他會立刻打開購物車繼續加東西
variations: 進階版：我又加買了一個運動水壺，覺得這次一定會去。它現在裝著昨天買的珍奶，已經喝完了。

en.content:
I bought a whole new workout set: moisture-wicking leggings, biker shorts, performance tank, limited-edition trainers.
Total damage: $260. Total times worn outside: zero.

They hang in the closet in perfect formation, as if to ask: 'sir, would you also like to pay the membership deposit while you're at it?'
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who treats every motivation dip as a shopping opportunity — they'll respond by opening their cart and adding more
variations: Pro tier: I also bought a sleek water bottle, certain this time I'd actually go. It's currently holding yesterday's bubble tea. Already empty.

items.sourceNote: 「the toughest part isn't watching what you eat, it's watching what other people eat」原典重寫，加台灣聚餐情境

zh-tw.content:
減肥最痛苦的，不是控制自己吃什麼。
是看朋友夾起一塊三層肉，沾了滿滿的醬油膏，配一口冰啤酒。

那一刻你終於明白：意志力不是用來對抗食物的，是用來對抗別人的。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每次聚餐都自帶水煮蛋的朋友——他會回你「我今晚就崩潰了」
variations: 進階版：對方還故意把碗推到你面前說「就吃一口啦」——這時候考的不是減肥，是修養。

en.content:
The hardest part of dieting isn't watching what you eat.
It's watching your friend pick up a piece of pork belly, dunk it in soy paste, and chase it with an ice-cold beer.

That's the moment you realize willpower was never about resisting food. It's about resisting other people.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who brings boiled eggs to every dinner — they'll reply 'I'm collapsing tonight'
variations: Advanced version: they slide the bowl toward you and say 'just one bite, come on'. At that point it's not a diet test. It's a character test.

items.sourceNote: 「inside me there's a thin person trying to get out, but I can usually shut them up with cake」經典格式重寫，加台灣甜點在地化

zh-tw.content:
我的身體裡住著一個瘦子，每天都很努力想跑出來。
還好我隨身準備了豆花、芋圓、雞蛋糕——

只要餵牠一輪，牠就會安靜地躺回去再睡一整年。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給住家附近就有甜點店的朋友——他會立刻拍一張今天的戰利品給你看
variations: 管理筆記：那個瘦子最近開始抗議我的餵食策略，我加碼一份珍奶，問題立刻解決。

en.content:
There's a thin person living inside me who tries to escape every day.
Luckily I keep tofu pudding, taro balls, and egg cakes on hand at all times.

One round of snacks and they go quietly back to sleep for another full year.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who lives next door to a dessert shop — they'll immediately send a photo of today's haul
variations: Management note: the thin person recently started protesting my feeding strategy. One extra bubble tea later, the issue was resolved.

items.sourceNote: Apple Watch / 智慧手錶熱量計算反向解讀的原創語錄

zh-tw.content:
我的手錶今天告訴我：你已經消耗了 480 大卡，幹得好。
我聽完非常感動，立刻獎勵自己一份雙拼便當。

手錶看到便當之後沉默了三秒，發出一聲短短的震動——
那是它在嘆氣。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每次運動完就要犒賞自己的朋友——他會把便當照片回給你當證據
variations: 後續：手錶今天直接關掉熱量提醒，改顯示「今日喝水量：不足」——它放棄治療我了。

en.content:
My smartwatch told me: you've burned 480 calories today, great job.
I was deeply moved, so I rewarded myself with a double-meat lunch box.

The watch went silent for three seconds after seeing it, then buzzed once, briefly.
That was a sigh.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who rewards every workout with a meal — they'll send a lunch box photo as Exhibit A
variations: Follow-up: the watch turned off calorie notifications today and switched to 'water intake: low'. It has officially given up on treating me.

items.sourceNote: 「abs are made in the kitchen」經典格言反轉自嘲，加台灣早餐店在地場景

zh-tw.content:
教練說：腹肌是在廚房裡練出來的。
我認真聽完，立刻走進廚房——

打開冰箱，拿出昨晚剩的滷肉飯，順便配一塊雞排。

所以我的腹肌應該很快就出來了，畢竟我每天都待在廚房。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每天嚷嚷要練腹肌結果都泡在早餐店的朋友——他會回你「這就是策略」
variations: 進階版：教練追問我廚房裡都在做什麼，我回答「重訓」——主要是把鍋從爐子搬到桌上。

en.content:
My trainer said: abs are made in the kitchen.
I took that very seriously and walked straight into mine.

Opened the fridge, pulled out last night's braised pork rice, and grabbed a fried chicken cutlet to go with it.

My abs should be appearing any day now, since I spend all my time in the kitchen.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who keeps talking about abs but lives at the breakfast joint — they'll reply 'this is strategy'
variations: Advanced version: my trainer asked what I do in the kitchen. I said 'strength training' — mostly carrying the pot from the stove to the table.

items.sourceNote: 「diet starts Monday」永恆延後格式重寫，加台灣國定假日在地化哏

zh-tw.content:
減肥從禮拜一開始。
但這禮拜一是連假，下禮拜一是月初要慶祝，再下禮拜一是發薪日。

我翻了一下行事曆，下一個適合減肥的禮拜一，落在 2027 年的某個冬天。
那天剛好沒有任何理由——我先標記起來。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每次都說「下禮拜一開始」的朋友——他會立刻打開行事曆找下一個藉口
variations: 更新：那個 2027 年的禮拜一已經被我預定了元宵節，所以順延到春分後第三個禮拜——保險起見，我先吃個雞排壓壓驚。

en.content:
The diet starts Monday.
But this Monday is a long weekend. Next Monday is the start of the month, which deserves celebrating. The Monday after that is payday.

I checked the calendar. The next Monday with no excuses lands somewhere in winter 2027.
I've gone ahead and marked it down.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who always says 'starting Monday' — they'll open their calendar to look for the next excuse
variations: Update: that 2027 Monday is now booked for a holiday, so the diet is postponed to the third Monday after the spring equinox. Just to be safe, I'm eating a fried chicken cutlet to settle my nerves.

items.sourceNote: 「seize the moment, women on the Titanic waved off the dessert cart」原典重寫，加台灣甜點車場景

zh-tw.content:
人生要把握當下。
你想想鐵達尼號上那些婉拒甜點車的女士——

她們最後遺憾的，絕對不是那塊沒吃的提拉米蘇。
所以今天的雞蛋糕、今天的芋圓、今天的車輪餅——
通通都是哲學決定。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每次猶豫要不要吃甜點的朋友——他會用這句話幫自己合理化整個下午茶
variations: 進階版：人生苦短，建議直接從甜點吃起，正餐當配菜——這叫做反向人生規劃。

en.content:
Seize the moment.
Think about all those women on the Titanic who waved away the dessert cart —

their last regret was definitely not the slice of tiramisu they skipped.
So today's brownie, today's ice cream, today's egg cake —
these are all philosophical decisions.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who hesitates over the dessert menu every single time — they'll use this to justify the whole afternoon tea
variations: Pro tier: life is short, eat dessert first and treat the main course as a side dish. This is called reverse life planning.

items.sourceNote: 「pizza cut into four or eight slices, four, can't eat eight」經典格式重寫，加台灣披薩外送在地化

zh-tw.content:
外送員問我：「您的披薩要切六片還是八片？」
我認真想了想，回答：「切六片就好，今天我吃八片可能會吃不下。」

他停頓了三秒，說：「好的先生，您的健康我們會放在心上。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每次叫披薩都「跟自己有約定」的朋友——他會立刻把這句話拿去當客服回覆
variations: 後續：下次他直接幫我切成四片，附上一張紙條寫：「省事一點，反正都進你嘴裡。」

en.content:
The delivery guy asked, "Would you like your pizza cut into six slices or eight?"
I thought about it carefully and said, "Six is fine. I don't think I could eat eight today."

He paused for three seconds and replied, "Of course, sir. We'll keep your wellness in mind."
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who orders pizza with 'an agreement with themselves' — they'll quote this back next time
variations: Follow-up: next time he just cut it into four slices and attached a note: 'saving us both the trouble — it's all going down the same way.'

items.sourceNote: 「I followed my heart and it led me to the fridge」原典重寫，加深夜冰箱在地場景

zh-tw.content:
我一直相信「跟著心走」這四個字。
結果心帶我去的地方，永遠是冰箱前面。

而且每次到了那裡，它都會自動打開——
好像連冰箱都知道，今晚又是它在主導我的人生。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合凌晨一點開冰箱前發限動，配一張冰箱燈打在臉上的自拍
variations: 醫生說這叫「夜間趨光性」，我說這叫「心臟導航出包」——目的地永遠是冷藏室第二層。

en.content:
I've always believed in following my heart.
Unfortunately, my heart leads me to exactly one place: the fridge.

And every time I get there, the door opens by itself —
like even the fridge knows tonight is another night it's running my life.
en.editorNote: Perfect for a 1 a.m. story before opening the fridge, paired with a selfie lit by the fridge bulb
variations: The doctor calls this 'nocturnal phototaxis'. I call it a heart GPS malfunction — the destination is always the second shelf of the fridge.

items.sourceNote: 「Me: I want abs. Also me: I want pizza.」雙重人格內心戲格式重寫，加台灣手搖飲在地化

zh-tw.content:
早上的我：今天要練腹肌，要喝兩公升的水，要早睡。
下午的我：手搖飲半糖去冰，謝謝。
晚上的我：鹹酥雞加九層塔，再來一份地瓜薯條。
凌晨的我：明天一定會更好。

四個人住在同一個身體裡，沒有一個聽得進另一個的話。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每天都跟自己內心開會的朋友——他會回你「我這四個人今天又吵架了」
variations: 更新：今天我嘗試讓四個人開會協調，結果他們唯一達成共識的是——再叫一杯珍奶。

en.content:
Morning me: today I'm doing abs, drinking two liters of water, going to bed early.
Afternoon me: large bubble tea, half sugar, less ice, thanks.
Evening me: fried chicken with basil, plus a side of sweet potato fries.
2 a.m. me: tomorrow will be better, I promise.

Four people living in one body. None of them listen to each other.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who holds daily internal meetings with themselves — they'll reply 'mine had another fight today'
variations: Update: today I tried to get all four to negotiate. The only consensus they reached was 'order one more bubble tea'.

items.sourceNote: 「水煮萬物」減重餐自欺幽默格式，原創語錄；台灣便當在地化

zh-tw.content:
我這禮拜開始吃水煮餐：水煮雞胸、水煮花椰菜、水煮蛋。
第三天我加了一點鹽。第五天加了一點胡椒。第七天加了一點辣椒醬、滷汁、跟一塊雞排。

所謂的水煮餐，其實是用「水」當作藉口的「煮一桌好菜」。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每次都揚言要吃水煮餐的朋友——他第三天就會私訊你「我撐不下去」
variations: 進階版：第十天我直接把水煮蛋換成滷蛋，理由是「滷汁也是液體，本質上還是水煮」。

en.content:
This week I started a boiled-everything diet: boiled chicken breast, boiled broccoli, boiled eggs.
Day three I added salt. Day five I added pepper. Day seven I added chili sauce, soy braising liquid, and a piece of fried chicken.

A 'boiled meal plan' is really just using the word 'boiled' as cover for cooking a full dinner.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who keeps announcing a clean-eating week — they'll DM you by day three saying 'I can't anymore'
variations: Day ten upgrade: I swapped the boiled egg for a soy-braised egg, on the grounds that 'braising liquid is technically water, so it still counts as boiled'.

items.sourceNote: 「量體重前的儀式感」原創語錄，加台灣浴室在地場景

zh-tw.content:
量體重前的儀式：上廁所、脫襪子、脫掉手錶、把頭髮綁起來、吐一口氣。
講究的時候，連耳環都摘下來，怕重 0.05 公斤。

結果踏上去那一刻，數字還是讓我懷疑——是不是該再脫一層皮。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每次量體重都當成法事在做的朋友——他會回你「我下次連靈魂都先卸下來」
variations: 升級流程：吹頭髮前量、洗澡後量、早上空腹量、晚上喝水前量——四個版本中我永遠選對自己最仁慈的那個。

en.content:
Pre-weigh-in ritual: pee, take off socks, remove watch, tie up hair, exhale fully.
On serious days I also remove earrings, in case they add 0.05 kilos.

The moment I step on the scale, the number still makes me wonder if I should also remove a layer of skin.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who turns weigh-ins into a religious ceremony — they'll reply 'next time I'm taking my soul off too'
variations: Upgraded protocol: weigh before drying hair, after showering, on an empty stomach in the morning, before drinking water at night — I always pick whichever number is most merciful.

items.sourceNote: 「鏡子物理學」不同光線決定身材的原創幽默格式；台灣試衣間在地化

zh-tw.content:
鏡子物理學第一條：光線決定身材。
家裡的浴室鏡：勉強合格。
百貨公司試衣間鏡：腿長 180 公分，腰圍縮水。
捷運站柱子的鏡面反射：建議直接回家不要出門。

所以說，要瘦不需要努力——
你只需要找到對的那面鏡子。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每次出門前都要繞三面鏡子才肯出發的朋友——他會立刻拍試衣間照給你看
variations: 進階版：手機自拍前鏡是中性的，後鏡是寫實派的，朋友幫拍的是現代主義——同一個人，三種畫派。

en.content:
Mirror physics, rule one: lighting decides your body.
Home bathroom mirror: passable.
Department store fitting room mirror: legs 180 cm long, waist mysteriously smaller.
Reflection in the subway pillar: just go home, do not go outside.

Losing weight doesn't require effort.
It requires finding the right mirror.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who circles three mirrors before leaving the house — they'll immediately send a fitting-room selfie
variations: Pro tier: front camera is neutral, back camera is realism, photos taken by friends are modernism — same person, three art movements.

items.sourceNote: 「運動完的內心拉扯」健身房旁邊一定有手搖飲店的台灣在地化原創語錄

zh-tw.content:
台灣的健身房有一個共同設計：走出大門，三十公尺內一定有一間手搖飲。
剛運動完的我，站在路口想了三秒——

科學告訴我這時候喝糖會抵銷一小時的運動，
但工程師告訴我這就叫「使用者體驗一條龍」。

最後我選擇相信工程師。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每次運動完都要犒賞自己一杯珍奶的朋友——他會回你「我也是相信工程師那派」
variations: 後續：我升級訂閱了健身房旁邊那間手搖店的會員，現在運動完直接刷會員卡——這叫做「健康循環」。

en.content:
Every gym in Taiwan shares the same urban design: walk out the front door and there's a bubble tea shop within 30 meters.
Fresh out of a workout, I stood at the corner and thought for three seconds.

Science says drinking sugar now cancels an hour of exercise.
The engineers say this is called 'end-to-end user experience'.

I chose to trust the engineers.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who rewards every workout with a bubble tea — they'll reply 'I'm also team engineer'
variations: Follow-up: I upgraded to a membership at the bubble tea shop next to the gym. Now I tap the loyalty card right after a workout. I call this a 'wellness loop'.

items.sourceNote: 2026 GLP-1 / 瘦瘦針社群梗在地化原創語錄；改寫自「out-eat Ozempic」名人發言概念

zh-tw.content:
朋友問我有沒有打瘦瘦針。
我說沒有，但我有「打嘴砲針」——每次照鏡子都跟自己說：「下個月一定瘦下來。」

效果差不多，副作用也很像：講完之後立刻去吃宵夜壓壓驚。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每個都在觀望瘦瘦針但還沒打的朋友——他會回你「我也是這個療程」
variations: 進階版：我這個療程最大的優點是不用回診，最大的缺點是永遠不會見效。

en.content:
A friend asked if I'm on the weight loss shot.
I said no, but I'm on the 'big talk shot' — every time I look in the mirror, I tell myself: 'next month for sure'.

The results are about the same. The side effects too: right after, I go eat a midnight snack to calm my nerves.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend eyeing GLP-1s but still on the fence — they'll reply 'same protocol over here'
variations: Advanced version: the best part of this protocol is no follow-up appointments. The worst part is it never actually works.

items.sourceNote: 端午節粽子季在地化原創語錄；五月底端午前夕場景

zh-tw.content:
端午節還沒到，我已經先預支了五顆粽子的熱量。
媽媽說：「就吃一顆。」
阿嬤說：「再吃一顆。」
姑姑說：「南部粽北部粽各一顆才公平。」
爸爸說：「冰箱還有，不吃會壞掉。」

所以我吃下的不是粽子，是整個家族的愛——一份大概 280 大卡。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給家裡每年端午都會多包三十顆的朋友——他會回你「我家今年自己包了七十顆」
variations: 後續：龍舟還沒下水，我已經先沉了——沉在沙發上動不了。

en.content:
Dragon Boat Festival hasn't even arrived and I've already pre-spent the calories of five rice dumplings.
Mom says: 'just one.'
Grandma says: 'have another.'
Auntie says: 'one southern-style and one northern-style — only fair.'
Dad says: 'there's still some in the fridge, they'll go bad.'

What I'm eating isn't rice dumplings. It's the love of an entire family — roughly 280 kcal each.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend whose family wraps thirty extra zongzi every year — they'll reply 'we made seventy this year'
variations: Aftermath: the dragon boats haven't launched yet, but I've already sunk — into the couch, immovable.

items.sourceNote: 2026 短影音 / 減肥網紅疲勞感原創幽默語錄；改寫自「effortless vs effortful」社群評價現象

zh-tw.content:
我滑短影音的時候，演算法決定今天我是減肥仔。
第一支：30 天瘦 8 公斤的奇蹟。
第二支：吃這三樣食物終身不胖。
第三支：教練罵醒你的 60 秒。
第四支：我的同款打卡早餐。

看完之後，我做了一個非常有覺察的決定——點開外送 app。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每天滑減肥短影音卻越滑越餓的朋友——他會回你「我同步在叫炸雞」
variations: 後續：我把首頁刷新三次，演算法終於放棄，改推宵夜店家——它認識我比較久。

en.content:
I open short videos and the algorithm decides today I'm on a diet journey.
Clip one: lost 8 kg in 30 days, miracle story.
Clip two: eat these three foods, never gain weight again.
Clip three: trainer yelling sense into you for 60 seconds.
Clip four: matching aesthetic breakfast bowls.

After watching, I made a very mindful, deeply intentional decision — I opened the food delivery app.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who scrolls diet content and somehow gets hungrier — they'll reply 'I'm ordering fried chicken right now'
variations: Follow-up: refreshed my feed three times, the algorithm finally gave up and switched to late-night spots — it's known me longer.

items.sourceNote: 「久坐不動的工程師生活」原創幽默語錄；台灣科技業文化在地化

zh-tw.content:
我的智慧手錶剛剛震動：「您已經連續坐了 90 分鐘，請站起來活動一下。」
我站起來，走到茶水間，倒了一杯咖啡，順手拿了兩塊餅乾，再坐回去。

手錶顯示：本次活動共消耗 3 大卡，攝取 180 大卡——
它欲言又止，最後沉默了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給辦公室椅子比床還熟的同事——他會回你「我手錶上禮拜就被我關靜音了」
variations: 升級版：我把每天的「站立通知」設定成手機開會自動拒接——這樣手錶就不會再嘲笑我了。

en.content:
My smartwatch just buzzed: 'you've been sitting for 90 minutes, time to stand up and move.'
I stood up, walked to the pantry, poured a coffee, grabbed two cookies on the way, and sat back down.

The watch logged: 3 kcal burned this session, 180 kcal consumed —
it started to say something, then went quiet.
en.editorNote: Send to the coworker whose office chair knows them better than their bed — they'll reply 'I muted my watch last week'
variations: Pro tier: I set the 'stand up' reminder to auto-decline whenever I'm in a meeting — that way the watch can't judge me anymore.

items.sourceNote: 「I'm into fitness, fittin' this pizza in my mouth」格式重寫；台灣夜市場景在地化

zh-tw.content:
朋友問我最近有沒有在運動。
我說有，我每天逛夜市。
從入口走到出口大概八百公尺，途中還要不停彎腰、伸手、舉杯——
手部、腿部、核心訓練全包了。

唯一的副作用是，回家體重多了 1.2 公斤。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每週至少報到夜市三次的朋友——他會回你「你忘了排隊也算耐力訓練」
variations: 升級版：我把「逛夜市」寫進健身計畫表，教練看完沉默了三秒，問我能不能也報名一個。

en.content:
A friend asked if I've been exercising lately.
I said yes, I walk through the night market every day.
It's about eight hundred meters from entrance to exit, and along the way I'm constantly bending, reaching, lifting cups —
that's arms, legs, and core all in one workout.

The only side effect is, I come home 1.2 kg heavier.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who hits a night market at least three times a week — they'll reply 'you forgot that queueing counts as endurance training'
variations: Upgrade: I added 'night market lap' to my training plan. The trainer went quiet for three seconds, then asked if he could sign up too.

items.sourceNote: 「summer body pending」夏天前夕格式原創重寫；2026 五月在地化

zh-tw.content:
已經五月了，我的夏季身材處理進度——
進度條卡在 4%，跑了三年。

每年我都跟自己說：「明年夏天前一定要練起來。」
後來我發現，我說的「明年」其實是無限期。

沒關係，海是包容的，沙灘也不會拒絕我，被拒絕的只有那條我去年買的泳褲。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在五月初貼限動，搭配一張你最近吃的炸物外帶——朋友會默默按愛心
variations: 後續：我決定不練了，改買一件比較寬鬆的襯衫，這樣經費可以拿去吃三頓海鮮自助餐。

en.content:
It's already May, and my summer body progress —
the loading bar is stuck at 4%, and it's been loading for three years.

Every year I tell myself: 'I'll be in shape by next summer for sure.'
Then I figured out that 'next year' is actually open-ended.

It's fine. The ocean is forgiving, the beach won't reject me. The only thing that rejected me is the swim trunks I bought last year.
en.editorNote: Perfect for an early-May story post paired with a takeout fried-food photo — friends will quietly tap the heart
variations: Follow-up: I'm calling it off. Bought a roomier shirt instead, and the leftover budget is going to three seafood buffets.

items.sourceNote: 「Dear stomach, you're bored not hungry」格式重寫；加入工作壓力情緒性飲食情境

zh-tw.content:
親愛的胃：
我知道你不是餓，是無聊。
我也知道你不是無聊，是被工作搞煩了。
我更知道你不是被工作搞煩，只是想藉故吃那塊冰箱裡的乳酪蛋糕。

好吧，那我們各退一步——
你只能吃一塊。
（兩分鐘後）整個盒子都不見了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每天五點三十分準時開冰箱的同事——他會回你「我家冰箱已經知道我下班時間」
variations: 後續對話——胃：「你看，我說了我不是真的餓。」我：「那你在吃什麼？」胃：「補充情緒。」

en.content:
Dear stomach,
I know you're not hungry, you're bored.
I also know you're not bored, you're just over today's work.
And I really know you're not over today's work — you just want an excuse to eat that cheesecake in the fridge.

Fine, we'll meet halfway —
you can have one slice.
(Two minutes later) the whole box is gone.
en.editorNote: Send to the coworker who opens the fridge at 5:30 PM sharp — they'll reply 'my fridge knows my clock-out time'
variations: Aftermath dialogue — Stomach: 'See, I told you I wasn't really hungry.' Me: 'Then what are you eating?' Stomach: 'Emotional supplements.'

items.sourceNote: 「The beach is gonna get whatever body I give it」自我接納幽默原創重寫

zh-tw.content:
今年夏天，我決定不再為了「夏季身材」內耗了。
海灘會收下任何一個我帶過去的身體，
它沒有報名表，也沒有面試，更沒有體脂門檻。

所以我準備帶一個吃過珍奶、配過鹹酥雞、看過三季韓劇的身體去看海——
這是它應得的假期。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合分享給每年都在嫌自己不夠瘦的朋友——讓他知道海灘從來沒在挑人
variations: 延伸版：我帶了它去海邊，它跟我說了一句話：「下次記得也帶點防曬，不要只記得帶罪惡感。」

en.content:
This summer, I'm done burning energy on the whole 'summer body' thing.
The beach will accept any body I bring to it.
There's no sign-up form, no interview, no body fat cutoff.

So I'm bringing a body that has tasted bubble tea, paired it with fried chicken, and watched three seasons of K-dramas — to see the ocean.
It has earned this vacation.
en.editorNote: Share with the friend who criticizes their body every summer — let them know the beach has never been picky
variations: Extended version: I took it to the beach, and it said one thing: 'next time, remember to pack sunscreen too — not just guilt.'

items.sourceNote: 「I'm into fitness. Fittin' this pizza in my mouth」格式延伸；換成台灣鹹酥雞情境

zh-tw.content:
我最近開始研究「健身」。
主要研究的是：怎麼把一整袋鹹酥雞「健」進「身」體裡。

目前進度：研究成果非常豐碩，腰圍也是。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每次說要練核心結果只練到下巴的朋友——他會回你一張嘴角沾醬油的自拍
variations: 下集預告：論文題目升級為「珍珠奶茶與半糖去冰之間的能量轉換」，預計三個月後在便利商店發表。

en.content:
I've recently taken up 'fitness'.
Main research topic: how to fit an entire bag of fried chicken into my body.

Current progress: results are very rich. So is my waistline.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who claims they're working on their core but only works on their double chin — they'll reply with a sauce-stained selfie
variations: Next chapter: research expands to 'energy transfer between bubble tea and half-sugar light-ice'. Findings to be presented at the 7-Eleven in three months.

items.sourceNote: 「I wish I could lose weight as easily as I lose my keys」格式重寫；加在地化遺失物清單

zh-tw.content:
我希望我能像弄丟其他東西一樣，輕易地把體重弄丟。

弄丟過的清單：鑰匙、悠遊卡、雨傘、耳機、耐心、青春、前任的訊息已讀紀錄。

唯獨體重，怎麼都黏在身上不肯走，比我前任還忠誠。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在掉了東西的那一天發限動，順便對照昨天的體重計數字
variations: 更新清單：今天又弄丟了五百塊跟今晚的減肥計畫，但體重還在原地等我。

en.content:
I wish I could lose weight as easily as I lose other things.

Things I have lost: keys, transit card, umbrella, AirPods, patience, my twenties, my ex's read receipts.

The only thing that won't leave is my body weight. More loyal than my ex.
en.editorNote: Post on a day you lost something — pair it with today's scale reading for full effect
variations: Updated list: today I also lost twenty bucks and tonight's diet plan. The weight is still waiting for me at home.

items.sourceNote: 「the salad gets brown but cookies don't」格式延伸；改成台灣冰箱蔬菜情境

zh-tw.content:
上週日買的生菜，今天打開冰箱已經變成一灘綠色的湯。
上個月買的洋芋片，今天打開袋口還是清脆的笑聲。

我看著它們，突然懂了：堅持的事情，不會壞掉的，從一開始就不是健康。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每次發誓「這週要吃健康」結果蔬菜放到爛掉的朋友——他會打開自己的冰箱拍給你看
variations: 後續：我把生菜倒掉，洋芋片打開——它們從架上對我點頭，像一群知道結局的觀眾。

en.content:
The salad I bought last Sunday is now a puddle of green sludge in the fridge.
The chips I bought last month still crunch like they were bagged yesterday.

Looking at them, I finally get it: the things that don't go bad? They were never the healthy choice.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who swears 'this week is healthy week' and watches their veggies rot — they'll reply with a photo of their own fridge
variations: Aftermath: I tossed the salad and opened the chips. They nodded at me from the counter like an audience that always knew the ending.

items.sourceNote: 原創語錄；體重計電池故障當逃避藉口的厭世情境

zh-tw.content:
我家的體重計這週故障了。
顯示「Lo」這個字。

我查了使用手冊：那是「電池低電量」的意思。
但我選擇相信它是「Lower than yesterday」，今天是個好日子。

下個月我會記得換電池——下下個月。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在每月一號偷偷量完體重後發限動，文案：今天的體重計很有禮貌
variations: 進階版：朋友送我一台新體重計，第一次站上去顯示「Hi」——它連打招呼都帶著嘲諷。

en.content:
My scale broke this week.
It's been showing 'Lo'.

The manual says it means 'low battery'.
But I've chosen to believe it means 'Lower than yesterday', and today is a good day.

I'll replace the battery next month. Or the month after.
en.editorNote: Post on the first of the month after a sneaky weigh-in — caption: 'my scale is being polite today'
variations: Sequel: a friend gave me a new scale. First time I stepped on, it displayed 'Hi'. Even the greeting came with attitude.

items.sourceNote: 原創語錄；婚禮喜宴情境下的減肥瓦解日常

zh-tw.content:
減肥計畫遇到的最大敵人，不是火鍋，不是宵夜，是——朋友的婚禮。

你身穿一套兩個月才剛買的小一號禮服，告訴自己今晚只吃半碗。
結果第三道菜端上來，鄰桌阿姨幫你夾了三隻蝦、半隻雞、一塊魚。

你抬頭看著禮服上的鈕扣，它正用最後一口氣對你眨眼。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給五月有三場婚禮要參加的朋友——他會回你「我已經提前買大一號了」
variations: 後續：婚禮結束我把禮服掛回衣櫥，跟它說「辛苦了」，它回我：「我還能再撐一場——但只能再一場。」

en.content:
The greatest enemy of any diet plan isn't hot pot. It isn't midnight snacks. It's — your friend's wedding.

You show up in a dress one size smaller, bought two months ago, telling yourself: tonight, just half a plate.
Then course three arrives, and the auntie at your table loads you up with three shrimp, half a chicken, and a slab of fish.

You look down at the button on your dress. It is winking at you with its last breath.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend with three weddings on the May calendar — they'll reply 'already bought the next size up'
variations: Follow-up: after the wedding I hung the dress back up and said 'thank you for your service'. It replied: 'I can survive one more — but only one.'

items.sourceNote: 「人生三大幻覺」格式重寫，融入減肥情境

zh-tw.content:
減肥人生有三大幻覺：
一、我還能再吃一口就好。
二、明天開始絕對認真。
三、這次的火鍋只算一餐。

三個幻覺輪流出現，每天剛好排滿一週。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給總是說「最後一口」說了三十次的朋友——他會用第四個幻覺回你
variations: 番外篇：第四個幻覺是「喝湯不會胖」，第五個是「站著吃熱量會掉」。

en.content:
Three illusions of every dieter's life:
1. Just one more bite, then I'll stop.
2. Tomorrow I'll get serious. For real this time.
3. This hot pot only counts as one meal.

The three illusions take turns showing up. They fill the entire week, perfectly.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who has said 'one last bite' thirty times tonight — they'll reply with the fourth illusion
variations: Bonus: illusion four is 'soup doesn't count'. Illusion five is 'eating standing up burns the calories'.

items.sourceNote: 「I followed my heart and it led me to the fridge」格式重寫

zh-tw.content:
我跟著我的心走，它把我帶到了冰箱前面。

我問它：「你確定嗎？現在是凌晨一點。」
它說：「相信我，這是命運。」

後來我才發現，我的心其實是我的胃假扮的。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在深夜開冰箱的瞬間發限動，背景配冰箱燈光最有氛圍
variations: 後續：第二天我跟我的心吵架，它說它已經辭職了，目前由胃代理職務直到明年春天。

en.content:
I followed my heart, and it led me straight to the fridge.

I asked it, 'Are you sure? It's 1 a.m.'
It said, 'Trust me. This is destiny.'

Later I realized my heart was actually my stomach in a costume.
en.editorNote: Perfect for a midnight story post the second the fridge light hits your face
variations: Follow-up: the next day I had a fight with my heart. It said it had resigned, and the stomach is acting in its place until next spring.

items.sourceNote: 原創語錄；運動 App 紀錄與真實飲食的對照

zh-tw.content:
今天運動 App 顯示：消耗 320 大卡。
回家路上我買的：一杯珍奶（550 大卡）、一份雞排（450 大卡）、一個飯糰（230 大卡）。

運動 App 看著我，沉默了三秒，然後默默把今天的成就改名叫——「努力過就好」。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合運動完馬上去買宵夜的那種朋友——他會回你「我今天連 App 都沒打開」
variations: 更新版：第二天 App 主動寄了一封信給我，主旨寫著「我們需要談談」。

en.content:
My workout app today: 320 calories burned.
What I bought on the way home: bubble tea (550), crispy chicken (450), one rice ball (230).

The app stared at me, paused for three seconds, then quietly renamed today's achievement to — 'at least you tried'.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who hits the gym then immediately hits 7-Eleven — they'll reply 'I didn't even open the app today'
variations: Update: the next day the app sent me an email. Subject line: 'we need to talk'.

items.sourceNote: 「該減的不是肥是慾望」毒雞湯格式重寫

zh-tw.content:
後來我終於領悟了——
該減的根本不是肥，是慾望。

結果今天逛超市的時候，慾望先把購物車裝滿，肥跟在後面幫忙結帳，
我站在收銀台前面，覺得自己只是被請來刷卡的。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每次走進超市就忘記減肥計畫的朋友——他會回你「我也是去買菜，結果買了零食」
variations: 番外：後來我決定戒掉慾望，慾望說它請了三天假，回來的時候會帶整箱泡麵當伴手禮。

en.content:
I finally figured it out —
the thing I need to lose isn't fat. It's desire.

Then I went to the supermarket today. Desire filled the cart first. Fat tagged along to help at checkout.
I just stood there at the register, feeling like I'd been hired to swipe the card.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who forgets every diet plan the second they walk into a supermarket — they'll reply 'I went for groceries and came out with snacks'
variations: Bonus: I decided to quit desire. Desire said it was taking a three-day vacation, and would be bringing back a whole case of instant noodles as a souvenir.

items.sourceNote: 「The first thing you lose on a diet is your sense of humor」格式重寫，加台灣場景

zh-tw.content:
減肥開始的第一天，你最先掉的不是體重。
是你的幽默感。

第三天連耐心一起掉了，第七天連朋友也掉了——
體重計上的數字一動也不動，但你已經輕了好多。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給最近一週都不太想說話的健身房戰友——他會回你一個白眼就是回應
variations: 進階版：第十四天連自尊也掉了，這時候教練會走過來說：「恭喜你進入心靈淨化階段。」

en.content:
Day one of a diet — the first thing you lose isn't weight.
It's your sense of humor.

Day three, your patience drops. Day seven, your friends drop.
The scale hasn't budged, but somehow you feel a lot lighter.
en.editorNote: Send to the gym buddy who's been quiet all week — they'll respond with a single eye roll
variations: Day fourteen, your self-esteem drops too. That's when the trainer walks over and says, 'congratulations, you've entered the spiritual cleansing phase.'

items.sourceNote: 「I'm not overweight, I'm just nine inches too short」經典格式重寫，加台灣身高在地化

zh-tw.content:
我不是太胖，我只是身高少了 12 公分。
換句話說，問題不在我這邊，是這副身體規格出廠的時候沒對齊。

所以我每天努力的方向，其實不是減重——
是想辦法把身高長回來。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每次量身高都偷偷踮腳的朋友——他會回你「我也是這樣安慰自己的」
variations:
後續：我去看了骨科，醫生說 30 歲後身高只會往下掉。
我說沒關係，那我改成減「相對體重」——這個聽起來比較有學術感。

en.content:
I'm not overweight. I'm just 12 cm too short.
In other words, the issue isn't on my end — the factory settings on this body were misaligned.

So what I'm working on every day isn't actually losing weight.
I'm trying to grow back the height I never had.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who quietly tiptoes during height measurements — they'll reply 'this is exactly how I cope'
variations:
Follow-up: I asked the orthopedist. He said after 30, height only goes down.
I said no problem — I'll switch to losing 'relative weight'. It sounds more academic.

items.sourceNote: 「I'm in shape, round is a shape」經典格式重寫，加台灣形狀詭辯延伸

zh-tw.content:
別人問我：「你最近有沒有在保持身材？」
我自信地回答：「當然有，我一直保持在『圓形』。」

圓形是宇宙最完美的形狀——沒有稜角、沒有對立、沒有缺口。
所以我不是胖，我是哲學上接近完美。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給最近被親戚問「是不是又胖了」的朋友——他會立刻把這句存下來等過年用
variations: 進階版：我最近正在從圓形轉型成「橢圓形」——更具流線感，也更符合空氣動力學。

en.content:
Someone asked me, 'have you been keeping in shape lately?'
I replied confidently, 'absolutely. I've been holding steady at *round*.'

Round is the most perfect shape in the universe — no edges, no opposition, no gaps.
So I'm not overweight. I'm just philosophically close to perfection.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who just got asked 'have you put on weight?' by a relative — they'll save this for the next family gathering
variations: Pro tier: I'm currently transitioning from round to oval — more streamlined, better aerodynamics.

items.sourceNote: 減肥意念瘦身原典重寫，加台灣腦波弱在地化哏

zh-tw.content:
我最近在嘗試一種新的減肥方法——意念瘦身法。
不節食、不運動、也不戒手搖飲，純粹用意念。

我每天睡前默念三遍：「我會瘦、我會瘦、我會瘦。」
結果體重沒變，但我的腦波被旁邊的鹹酥雞攤完美攔截了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每次都說「下次一定」的朋友——他會回你「我也試過，失敗了 87 次」
variations: 更新：今天我把咒語改成「我吃了不會胖」——測試了三天，結果只有體重相信這句話，鏡子完全不買單。

en.content:
Lately I've been trying a new diet method — willpower-only weight loss.
No dieting, no exercise, no quitting bubble tea. Pure mind over matter.

Every night before bed I chant three times: 'I will get thin, I will get thin, I will get thin.'
My weight hasn't moved, but my brain waves got perfectly intercepted by the fried chicken stand on the corner.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who keeps saying 'next time for sure' — they'll reply 'I've tried it, failed 87 times'
variations: Update: today I switched the mantra to 'this won't make me gain weight'. Tested for three days. The scale believed me. The mirror absolutely did not.

items.sourceNote: 「等我瘦了再去找你」最委婉訣別格式重寫，加台灣朋友圈場景

zh-tw.content:
朋友傳訊息說：「等我瘦下來再約。」
我看著那句話心裡一緊——
這應該是這個世紀最委婉的訣別。

我立刻回他：「沒關係，我等你。」
畢竟我這輩子最不缺的就是時間，最缺的才是會赴約的朋友。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每次都用「等我瘦」當理由不出門的朋友——他會回你「你怎麼這麼了解我」
variations: 後續：三年後我們在便利商店巧遇，他手上拿著兩盒鮮奶油泡芙，看到我的瞬間說：「這是我給未來的我準備的。」

en.content:
A friend texted me: 'let's hang out once I lose the weight.'
My heart sank when I read it.
That's the most polite goodbye of this century.

I replied: 'no problem, I'll wait.'
Time is the one thing I have plenty of. Friends who actually show up — that's the shortage.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who keeps using 'once I'm thinner' as an excuse to skip plans — they'll reply 'how do you know me so well'
variations: Follow-up: three years later we ran into each other at the convenience store. He was holding two cream puffs and said, 'these are for future me.'

items.sourceNote: 「If you drink a gallon of water per day, you won't have time for other people's drama」格式重寫，加台灣手搖飲在地化

zh-tw.content:
營養師說：每天喝兩公升水，新陳代謝會變好。
我認真喝了一週，新陳代謝沒進步，倒是膀胱練成了健身房。

現在我每天最忙的不是減肥，是排隊上廁所——也算是一種有氧運動。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給辦公室裡水壺最大支的同事——他會邊去廁所邊已讀
variations: 進階版：第二週我改喝氣泡水，膀胱沒事，但打嗝的頻率讓主管以為我在偷偷說話。

en.content:
The nutritionist said: drink two liters of water a day and your metabolism will improve.
I tried it for a week. Metabolism didn't budge, but my bladder is now in the best shape of its life.

These days my busiest activity isn't dieting — it's queuing for the bathroom. I'm calling it light cardio.
en.editorNote: Send to the coworker with the biggest water bottle in the office — they'll read it on the way to the restroom
variations: Upgrade: week two I switched to sparkling water. Bladder's fine, but I burp so often my manager thinks I'm muttering under my breath.

items.sourceNote: 「該減的不是肥而是慾望」經典格式重寫，加台灣消費場景延伸

zh-tw.content:
朋友勸我減肥，我說我有在減。
他說：「你昨天才吃了兩份鹹酥雞。」
我說：「我減的不是肥，是『再吃一份就好』的慾望。」

結果今天我又吃了第三份——慾望沒減，反而升了一個職等。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每次說「最後一口」說了五次的朋友——他會回你「至少我還有目標」
variations: 後續：我把這句話貼在冰箱上，當作警語。結果只看了一眼，就順手把冷凍披薩拿出來退冰了。

en.content:
A friend told me to lose weight. I said I'm working on it.
He said, 'you ate two orders of fried chicken yesterday.'
I said, 'I'm not cutting the calories. I'm cutting the urge to say *just one more*.'

Today I ate a third order. The urge didn't shrink — it got promoted.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who's said 'last bite' five times in a row — they'll reply 'at least I have ambition'
variations: Follow-up: I stuck the quote on my fridge as a warning. Glanced at it once, then pulled a frozen pizza out to defrost.

items.sourceNote: 「年齡回不去但體重回得去」原典格式重寫，加台灣同學會場景在地化

zh-tw.content:
30 歲過後我才發現：年齡是回不去的，但體重是回得去的。
問題是它每次回去，都會多帶兩個朋友來。

所以我現在的減肥目標已經從「瘦回大學體重」，下修成「瘦回上週體重」。
人要懂得設定務實的 KPI。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給最近被約同學會但還在猶豫要不要去的朋友——他會說這就是他的內心 OS
variations: 進階版：我把瘦身計畫拆成「Q1：戒手搖、Q2：戒宵夜、Q3：戒藉口、Q4：直接戒同學會」。

en.content:
After 30, I figured something out: age never comes back, but weight always does.
The problem is it brings two friends every time.

So my goal has been quietly downgraded — from 'get back to college weight' to 'get back to last week's weight'.
Realistic KPIs are a sign of maturity.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend stalling on whether to go to the class reunion — they'll say this is exactly what's in their head
variations: Pro tier: I broke the plan into quarters. Q1: quit bubble tea. Q2: quit late-night snacks. Q3: quit excuses. Q4: just quit the reunion.

items.sourceNote: 「Cookies don't go brown and soggy like salad」格式重寫，加台灣便利商店在地化

zh-tw.content:
你買了一包生菜，三天後它變成棕色的泥。
你買了一盒蛋黃酥，三個月後它還是那個樣子。

科學告訴我們：耐放的食物才是真愛。
所以我不是不健康，我只是選擇了一段更穩定的關係。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給冰箱裡蔬菜永遠爛在抽屜底層的朋友——他會回你「你不要再揭穿我了」
variations: 延伸版：便利商店的茶葉蛋可以放七天，這就是我每天去買的原因——它從不背叛我。

en.content:
You buy a bag of salad. Three days later it's a brown puddle.
You buy a box of pineapple cakes. Three months later they're still perfect.

Science says: shelf-stable food is the real love story.
I'm not unhealthy. I just chose the more emotionally stable relationship.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend whose fridge has a vegetable graveyard in the bottom drawer — they'll reply 'stop exposing me'
variations: Bonus: the convenience store tea egg lasts a full week. That's why I visit daily. It has never let me down.

items.sourceNote: 健身房月費 vs 實際使用次數格式重寫，加台灣健身房合約在地化

zh-tw.content:
我辦了一年期的健身房會員，月費 1,200。
上個月我去了一次，所以那次運動的單價是 1,200。

換算下來，我每流一滴汗就值 50 塊——
這是我這輩子最有價值的身體分泌物。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每年初辦健身房、年底直接續約沒去過幾次的朋友——他會回你「你怎麼知道我的人生」
variations: 後續：我把這筆帳算給女友看，她說那不如把錢給她，她保證讓我每天都有大量出汗的機會。

en.content:
I signed a one-year gym membership at $40 a month.
Last month I went once, so that single session cost $40.

Every drop of sweat I produced was worth roughly $2 —
the most valuable bodily fluid of my entire life.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who renews their gym contract every January and goes maybe four times — they'll reply 'how do you know my life'
variations: Follow-up: I showed the math to my girlfriend. She said just give her the money — she'd guarantee daily sweating.

items.sourceNote: 「Stressed spelled backwards is desserts」經典格式重寫，加台灣甜點在地化

zh-tw.content:
我發現一個宇宙的祕密：
「壓力」這兩個字倒過來唸，唸不出來，但意思就是「來一份芋泥蛋糕」。

所以每次主管罵我，我都是在依照宇宙的指示去甜點店——
這不是貪吃，這是回應召喚。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每次加班完一定要繞去買甜點的同事——他會把這句當成 KPI 來達成
variations: 進階版：如果再加上一杯熱拿鐵，宇宙的訊號會變得更清楚，清楚到我可以聽見它說「再來一塊」。

en.content:
I figured out a secret of the universe:
spell 'stressed' backwards and you get 'desserts' — which is just the universe whispering 'go buy a slice of taro cake'.

So every time my boss yells at me, I'm not snacking. I'm answering a sacred summons from the cosmos.
en.editorNote: Send to the coworker who always detours to the bakery after overtime — they'll treat it as a personal KPI
variations: Pro tier: add a hot latte and the cosmic signal sharpens enough that you can actually hear it say 'one more slice'.

items.sourceNote: 「Second day of a diet is always easier — by the second day you're off it」格式重寫

zh-tw.content:
大家都說減肥的第一天最痛苦，第二天就會比較輕鬆。
這是真的——因為第二天我已經不在減肥了。

你看，痛苦其實有解藥，叫做「算了」。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在禮拜二的早上發限動，搭配一張你準備吃的早餐三明治
variations: 延伸版：第三天我會宣布「先讓身體休息一下」，第四天叫做「策略性調整」，第五天直接命名為「下個月再說」。

en.content:
Everyone says day one of a diet is the hardest and day two gets easier.
It's true — by day two, I'm not on the diet anymore.

Turns out suffering does have a cure. It's called 'never mind'.
en.editorNote: Perfect for a Tuesday morning story post, paired with a photo of the breakfast sandwich you're about to inhale
variations: Day three I announce 'letting my body rest'. Day four is 'strategic recalibration'. Day five gets renamed 'next month's problem'.

items.sourceNote: 「Calories are little creatures that sew your clothes tighter」格式重寫，加台灣衣櫃場景

zh-tw.content:
我終於知道為什麼我去年的牛仔褲今年穿不下了——
是卡路里在我睡覺的時候，偷偷把每一件褲頭都改窄了 2 公分。

這些小東西沒有別的興趣，只負責把衣服改小，順便毀掉我出門前的好心情。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每次換季試衣服都崩潰的朋友——他會回你「原來不是我的錯」
variations: 後續：我把這件事告訴店員，他說那是棉的自然回縮。我看著他真誠的眼神，決定當作我們都還相信這個世界。

en.content:
I finally figured out why last year's jeans don't fit this year —
calories are little creatures that sneak into my closet at night and take 2 cm off every waistband.

They have no other hobbies. Just resizing my clothes and ruining my mood before I leave the house.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who has a meltdown every change of season trying things on — they'll reply 'so it wasn't my fault'
variations: Follow-up: I told the store clerk. He said it was natural cotton shrinkage. I looked into his sincere eyes and decided we should both keep believing in this world.

items.sourceNote: 「I'm just a girl standing in front of a salad asking it to be a donut」格式重寫，加台灣早餐店在地化

zh-tw.content:
我是一個人，站在早餐店的菜單前，
誠懇地請求那碗生菜沙拉，請它變成一份蛋餅加大冰奶。

它沒回我，但老闆娘聽到了，她說：「妹妹，蛋餅那邊在排隊。」
感謝這個世界，至少有人懂我。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每次點沙拉前都會猶豫三分鐘的朋友——他會說這是他每天早上的內心戲
variations: 後續：我最後還是點了沙拉，但加了一份薯餅當配菜，因為人生需要平衡。

en.content:
I'm just one person, standing in front of the breakfast shop menu,
sincerely asking the bowl of salad to become an egg crepe with a large iced milk tea.

The salad didn't answer, but the owner heard me. She said, 'sweetie, the egg crepe line is over there.'
Thank you, world. Someone gets it.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who hesitates three minutes before ordering a salad — they'll say it's their daily inner monologue
variations: Follow-up: I ordered the salad anyway, but added a hash brown on the side because life is about balance.

items.sourceNote: 「Stressed spelled backwards is desserts」格式重寫，加台灣手搖飲場景

zh-tw.content:
「壓力」倒過來唸是什麼，我不知道，
但「沒手搖」倒過來唸絕對是「我會死」。

所以下午三點點一杯，是為了維持基本生命徵象，不是貪吃。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每天下午都堅持點手搖的同事——他會立刻共鳴並按下訂購鍵
variations: 進階版：醫生說壓力會胖，我點了第二杯，目的是讓自己不要因為壓力胖。
後續：辦公室的訂單統計顯示，這個月我已經為公司貢獻了一個珍珠的體積。

en.content:
I don't know what 'stress' spelled backwards is,
but 'no bubble tea' spelled backwards is definitely 'I will die'.

So ordering one at 3 pm is about maintaining basic life signs. Not greed.
en.editorNote: Send to the coworker who insists on a 3 pm boba run — they'll relate and tap order immediately
variations: Upgrade: my doctor said stress makes you gain weight, so I ordered a second cup to prevent stress weight gain.
Follow-up: the office order tracker shows I've personally contributed one pearl's worth of volume to the company this month.

items.sourceNote: 「The second day of a diet is always easier」格式重寫，加台灣便當在地化

zh-tw.content:
減肥的第二天，永遠比第一天簡單。
因為到了第二天，你已經不在減肥了。

所以我的減肥紀錄看起來很豐富——
我擁有了 47 個第一天，沒有任何第二天。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在週一早上九點貼限動，搭配一張你正在排隊的便當店
variations: 後續：我打算把這 47 個第一天裝訂成冊，作為一份完整的「我曾經很努力」證明文件。
更新：今天是新的第一天，這個月的第 12 次。

en.content:
Day two of a diet is always easier than day one.
Because by day two, you're no longer on the diet.

That's why my diet history looks so impressive —
I have 47 day-ones, and exactly zero day-twos.
en.editorNote: Perfect for a Monday 9 am story, ideally paired with a photo of you in line at a takeout shop
variations: Follow-up: I'm planning to bind all 47 day-ones into a portfolio. Proof that I have, at various points, tried.
Update: today is a new day one. The twelfth one this month.

items.sourceNote: 「I want to be a caterpillar, eat a lot, sleep, wake up beautiful」格式重寫，加台灣作息在地化

zh-tw.content:
我下輩子想當一隻毛毛蟲：
第一週：拼命吃。
第二週：拼命睡。
第三週：醒來變成蝴蝶。

我這輩子的版本是：第一週拼命吃。第二週繼續拼命吃。第三週發現衣服變緊。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每次假日只想躺著的朋友——他會說這就是他的人生規劃
variations: 後續：我跟同事說了這個夢想，她說毛毛蟲也要結蛹，不是只負責吃睡。我決定改當水母，水母最自由。
進階版：我想當一隻在便利商店冷藏櫃裡的布丁，安靜地存在，不被人打擾，直到有人選擇我。

en.content:
In my next life, I want to be a caterpillar:
Week one: eat a lot.
Week two: sleep a lot.
Week three: wake up as a butterfly.

My current-life version: week one, eat a lot. Week two, eat more. Week three, notice my pants are tighter.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend whose only weekend plan is horizontal — they'll call it their life roadmap
variations: Follow-up: I told a coworker about this dream. She said caterpillars still have to do the cocoon part. I'm switching to jellyfish. Jellyfish look free.
Upgrade: actually I want to be a pudding in the convenience store fridge. Quietly existing. Undisturbed. Until someone chooses me.

items.sourceNote: 「I'm into fitness — fittin' this pizza in my mouth」格式重寫，改成台灣鹹酥雞在地化

zh-tw.content:
朋友問我有沒有在健身，
我說有啊，我每天都在「健身」——
健康地把這份鹹酥雞放進我身體裡。

他沉默了三秒，然後問我多點一份要不要均攤。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在週五晚上 10 點傳給戰友，附一張剛炸好的鹹酥雞照
variations: 後續：我們最後點了兩份，因為「兩個人不能只點一份，這樣不夠均勻」。
進階版：明天我會去健身房，把今天吃的鹹酥雞健身回去。預估需要 4 小時，最後我會留下 30 分鐘，然後去買第二份。

en.content:
A friend asked if I work out.
I said yes, every day — I work out
how to fit this entire bag of fried chicken into my body.

He paused for three seconds, then asked if I wanted to split a second order.
en.editorNote: Best deployed Friday at 10 pm to a fellow soldier, ideally with a photo of fresh-from-the-fryer snacks
variations: Follow-up: we ended up ordering two. 'Two people can't order just one. That's not balanced.'
Upgrade: tomorrow I'll go to the gym and work off everything I ate. Estimated time: 4 hours. Realistically: 30 minutes, then I'll go buy the second bag.

items.sourceNote: 「該減的不是肥，是慾望」毒雞湯金句重寫，加台灣夜市場景

zh-tw.content:
醫生說：「該減的不是肥，是慾望。」
我點頭如搗蒜，然後走進夜市。

結果我發現——慾望也能秤重，一斤大約 80 元，現點現炸，外帶免費附辣椒。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合貼在夜市打卡照下面當文案，朋友會說「這也太精準」
variations: 後續：我把這句話告訴老闆，他說他賣的不是炸物，是現代人的解藥。我加買了一份雞排。
進階版：醫生說的「慾望」這個東西，原來在我家附近就買得到，而且還有會員集點。

en.content:
The doctor said, 'You don't need to lose weight. You need to lose your cravings.'
I nodded earnestly, then walked into the night market.

Turns out cravings can be weighed too. About 80 NT per portion, fried to order, free chili on the side.
en.editorNote: Perfect caption for a night market check-in photo — friends will reply 'too accurate'
variations: Follow-up: I told the stall owner what my doctor said. He replied that he doesn't sell fried food. He sells the cure for modern life. I bought an extra piece of fried chicken.
Upgrade: turns out the 'cravings' my doctor warned me about are sold near my apartment. Loyalty card included.

items.sourceNote: 「I see food and I eat it」海食主義經典格式重寫，加台灣便利商店在地化

zh-tw.content:
我長期實行「海食主義」——
看到食物就吃。

醫生問我吃多少海鮮，我說沒有，但每天經過便利商店都會跟它打招呼，順便帶兩個飯糰回家。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合貼在便利商店戰利品照下面，朋友會說「這就是我」
variations: 進階版：海食主義者第一條守則——只要是放在玻璃櫃後面、被燈光照著的，都算海。
後續：今天我擴展食材範圍，把架上所有的關東煮都納入海洋的一部分。

en.content:
I'm a strict follower of the seafood diet —
I see food, I eat it.

The doctor asked how much actual seafood I eat. None. But I do greet the convenience store every day on my way home and bring back two rice balls.
en.editorNote: Perfect caption under a convenience store haul photo — friends will reply 'literally me'
variations: Upgrade: rule one of the seafood diet — anything behind glass and under warm lighting counts as ocean.
Follow-up: today I expanded the menu and declared every item in the hot deli case part of the sea.

items.sourceNote: 「Inside me is a skinny lady trying to get out, but I keep her quiet with cake」原典重寫，加台灣手搖飲場景

zh-tw.content:
我體內住著一個想出來的瘦子，
她一直在敲門。

我每次都用一杯半糖少冰把她安撫回去，她現在已經學會自己點了，今天還跟我說要加珍珠。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在週三下午拍手搖飲的時候配文，會收到一堆「我們是同一人」的回應
variations: 更新：今天她升級成熟客，店員看到我直接問「老樣子？」，我點頭，她在裡面也點頭。
進階版：她最近開始幫我選店——我說我要去吃沙拉，她說「不，左轉，那家有新口味」。

en.content:
There's a skinny version of me inside, trying to get out.
She keeps knocking.

I quiet her down with a half-sugar boba every time. She's learned to order on her own now, and today she added pearls.
en.editorNote: Pair it with a Wednesday afternoon boba photo and watch the 'this is literally us' replies roll in
variations: Update: today she's a regular. The cashier asked 'the usual?' I nodded. She nodded too, from inside.
Upgrade: she started picking the spots. I said I wanted salad. She said 'no, turn left, they have a new flavor'.

items.sourceNote: 原創語錄；冷氣房久坐 vs 夏天運動熱量計算的厭世現實

zh-tw.content:
夏天到了，朋友邀我去戶外跑步。
我算了一下熱量——
跑半小時消耗 250 大卡，回家補一杯冰拿鐵 280 大卡。

結論：留在冷氣房裡躺平，反而是最節能的減肥方式。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在五月底傳給「夏天還沒準備好身材」的朋友——他會立刻按收藏
variations: 進階版：科學告訴我們，移動會產生熱能，所以不動其實是在幫地球降溫。
後續：我把這套理論說給教練聽，他停頓了三秒，然後幫我加了五組深蹲。

en.content:
Summer's here. A friend invited me on an outdoor run.
I did the math —
half an hour burns 250 calories, the iced latte I'll need afterwards is 280.

Conclusion: lying flat in air conditioning is the most energy-efficient form of weight loss.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who is 'not summer-body ready yet' in late May — instant bookmark
variations: Upgrade: science says motion generates heat, so by not moving I'm actually helping cool the planet.
Follow-up: I explained this theory to my trainer. He paused for three seconds, then added five sets of squats.

items.sourceNote: 「胖是一天天吃來的，肥也得一天天減下去」毒雞湯重寫，加複利投資諧音梗

zh-tw.content:
胖是一天天吃來的，肥也得一天天減下去。
聽起來很公平，其實一點都不。

吃進去用的是複利，減出去是定存，兩邊利率完全不一樣。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在月初檢視體重時配文，會收到一堆「我也想轉戶」的留言
variations: 進階版：脂肪是台灣唯一一檔保證年化 365% 報酬的資產，本金每天自動加碼。
後續：我問理專要怎麼贖回，他說「先停止扣款」。我點了餐後甜點。

en.content:
You gain it one day at a time, you have to lose it one day at a time.
Sounds fair. It's not.

Gaining runs on compound interest. Losing is a fixed deposit. The rates are nowhere near each other.
en.editorNote: Use this on the first of the month when you check the scale — expect a flood of 'I want to switch banks too' replies
variations: Upgrade: body fat is the only asset guaranteeing 365% annualized returns, with automatic top-ups daily.
Follow-up: I asked my financial advisor how to redeem. He said 'stop the recurring deposit first'. I ordered dessert.

items.sourceNote: 「Going on a diet is like trying to forget someone you really like」格式重寫，加前任比喻延伸

zh-tw.content:
減肥就像試著忘掉一個你很喜歡的人。
你跟自己說我可以，結果半夜兩點他傳來訊息——

是我家樓下鹹酥雞攤的「今晚最後一鍋」限時動態。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在深夜限動發出來，配一張黑漆漆的天花板照片
variations: 進階版：而且這個前任還會走進你的夢裡，問你到底要不要復合，順便附上菜單。
後續：我點了。我跟他復合了。我們約定這次絕對不分開——至少撐到明天早餐。

en.content:
Going on a diet is like trying to forget someone you really like.
You tell yourself you can do it. Then at 2 a.m. they message you —

it's the late-night fried chicken stall's 'last batch tonight' story.
en.editorNote: Drop it as a late-night story with a photo of your dark ceiling — peak relatable energy
variations: Upgrade: this ex also shows up in your dreams asking if you want to get back together, menu attached.
Follow-up: I ordered. We got back together. We promised this time was forever — or at least until breakfast.

items.sourceNote: 「I stepped on the scale today. It asked for my username and password」格式重寫，加雲端備份延伸

zh-tw.content:
今天踩上體重計，它先請我輸入帳號密碼。
登入後跳出第二道驗證：「請確認你不是機器人」。

我懂了，這台機器在拖時間，怕我看到結果直接砸了它。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合月中量體重那天發限動，配一張體重計螢幕的特寫（黑屏剛好）
variations: 進階版：第三道驗證是「請寫一篇 200 字心得，說明你最近三餐吃了什麼」。
後續：我輸入完成功登入，它顯示「系統繁忙，請稍後再試」——我也學到了，逃避真的有用。

en.content:
Stepped on the scale today. It asked for my username and password.
Then came the second verification: 'please confirm you are not a robot'.

I get it now. The machine is stalling, scared I'll smash it the moment I see the number.
en.editorNote: Post as a mid-month story with a close-up of your scale screen (a black one works perfectly)
variations: Upgrade: the third verification asks for a 200-word essay on what you've eaten for the past three meals.
Follow-up: I logged in successfully. It said 'system busy, please try again later'. Turns out avoidance does work.

items.sourceNote: 「I followed my heart, and it led me to the fridge」格式重寫，加 Google Maps 延伸

zh-tw.content:
聽說人要跟著內心走，於是我跟著它走。
它把我帶到冰箱前，停下來，然後開門。

我才發現，原來我的心臟不是器官，是 Google Maps，而且只記得一個目的地。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合深夜開冰箱前發出來，配一張冰箱燈光打在臉上的自拍
variations: 進階版：而且這個導航沒有「最短路徑」選項，只有「最美味路徑」跟「最罪惡路徑」。
後續：我問它能不能更新版本，它說可以——升級費用是一杯珍奶。

en.content:
They say follow your heart, so I did.
It led me to the fridge, paused, then opened the door.

Turns out my heart isn't an organ. It's Google Maps, and it only remembers one destination.
en.editorNote: Post right before a late-night fridge raid, ideally with a selfie lit by the open fridge
variations: Upgrade: this navigation has no 'shortest route' option — only 'tastiest route' and 'guiltiest route'.
Follow-up: I asked if I could update the firmware. It said yes — the upgrade fee is one bubble tea.

items.sourceNote: 「人生有3大幻覺：我還能再吃一點、明天開始減肥、這次不會胖」格式重寫，加四個版本延伸

zh-tw.content:
人生有四大幻覺：
一、我還能再吃一口。
二、明天開始減肥。
三、這次絕對不會胖。
四、其實我穿衣服顯瘦。

四個全中的人請舉手——對，就是現在正在看這篇的你。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳到朋友群組，會收到三個已讀不回跟一個哭臉貼圖
variations: 進階版：第五大幻覺是「我這個體重其實是肌肉比較重」。
後續：我做了一份問卷，結果顯示我四個都中——系統建議我直接申請終身會員。

en.content:
Life's four great illusions:
1. I can fit in one more bite.
2. The diet starts tomorrow.
3. This time I definitely won't gain weight.
4. I actually look thinner with clothes on.

If you scored four out of four, raise your hand. Yes, that means you, currently reading this.
en.editorNote: Drop this in the group chat — expect three 'read' receipts and one crying emoji
variations: Upgrade: the fifth illusion is 'this weight is mostly muscle, muscle is heavier'.
Follow-up: I took the quiz, scored four out of four. The system recommended I apply for lifetime membership.

items.sourceNote: 「Inside some of us is a thin person struggling to get out, sedated with chocolate cake」格式重寫，加台味延伸

zh-tw.content:
聽說每個胖子體內，都住著一個想衝出來的瘦子。
我體內這位很安分，因為我每天都餵他兩塊蛋糕、一杯手搖、外加宵夜配劇。

他現在不只不想出來，還跟我簽了長期租約。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在點完外送等待時發出來，配一張外送員距離 0.2 公里的截圖
variations: 進階版：他最近還跟我提加租金，理由是「房間變大了，採光更好」。
後續：我問他要不要搬走，他回我「外面景氣不好，這裡有冷氣有 Netflix，沒事不會走」。

en.content:
They say inside every overweight person is a thin one trying to break out.
Mine is very well-behaved, because I feed him two slices of cake, one bubble tea, and a midnight snack with Netflix daily.

He no longer wants to leave. He's also asked to sign a long-term lease.
en.editorNote: Post while waiting for delivery, ideally with a screenshot of the driver 0.2 km away
variations: Upgrade: he recently asked for a rent increase, citing 'bigger room, better lighting'.
Follow-up: I asked if he wanted to move out. He said 'the economy's rough out there, and you've got AC and Netflix in here. I'm not going anywhere'.

items.sourceNote: 「seafood diet（看到食物就吃）」格式重寫，加入台灣外送語境

zh-tw.content:
我最近開始實施「看到飲食法」：
看到食物就吃，看到甜點就點，看到外送 App 開著就滑。

執行三天，瘦了 0 公斤，App 等級倒是升了兩階。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在 Uber Eats 推播半價券時轉發，當作自我合理化的證據
variations: 進階版：第七天解鎖隱藏成就「店家記得你」，外送員主動問你今天要不要加大杯。
後續：App 寄了一封信給我，標題是「感謝你成為我們的年度貴賓」。

en.content:
I'm trying a new approach called the 'see-it diet':
If I see food, I eat it. If I see dessert, I order it. If I see a delivery app open, I scroll it.

Three days in: 0 kg lost, but my app loyalty tier jumped two levels.
en.editorNote: Perfect to share when your delivery app pushes a half-price coupon — solid evidence for self-justification
variations: Upgrade: day seven unlocks the hidden achievement 'the restaurant remembers your order'.
Follow-up: the app sent me a letter titled 'thank you for being our VIP of the year'.

items.sourceNote: 「If you still look cute at the end of your workout, you didn't train hard enough」格式延伸，加入鏡子自拍語境

zh-tw.content:
健身教練說：「運動完還能拍美照，代表你根本沒有認真。」
所以我每次去健身房，都會先在更衣室拍三張，再走到器材區做兩下。

這樣至少限動有東西放，數據也對得起會員費。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在月底會員費自動扣款後發出來，配一張你最愛的更衣室自拍
variations: 進階版：教練看到我的限動之後，把我從「進步中」名單轉到「形象大使」名單。
後續：我朋友看了三個月，以為我練出腹肌，結果其實是濾鏡每月升級。

en.content:
My trainer says: 'If you still look cute after a workout, you weren't really training.'
So every time I hit the gym, I take three locker-room selfies first, then do two reps on a machine.

That way my story has content, and the data justifies my membership fee.
en.editorNote: Post this after your monthly membership auto-debits — pair with your favorite locker-room selfie
variations: Upgrade: after seeing my stories, my trainer moved me from the 'in progress' list to the 'brand ambassador' list.
Follow-up: my friend watched for three months and thought I'd grown abs. Turns out the filters just kept upgrading.

items.sourceNote: 「I have gained and lost the same ten pounds so many times my cellulite must have déjà vu」格式重寫

zh-tw.content:
我這輩子已經減過同樣三公斤超過二十次。
它離開又回來、回來又離開，比任何前任都還執著。

我們之間早就不是減肥，是輪迴。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在連假最後一天傳給減肥群組——大家都剛從前任那邊回來
variations: 進階版：這三公斤已經有自己的姓名、生日、和回家的路。
後續：我跟它約好下次見面是中秋節前一週，地點在體重計上。

en.content:
I have lost the same three kilos more than twenty times in my life.
They leave, they come back, they leave, they come back — more persistent than any ex I've had.

At this point it's not weight loss anymore. It's reincarnation.
en.editorNote: Send this to the diet group chat on the last day of a long weekend — everyone's exes just came home
variations: Upgrade: those three kilos now have their own name, birthday, and a route home.
Follow-up: we've scheduled our next reunion a week before the holidays, on top of the scale.

items.sourceNote: 「Exercise? I thought you said extra fries」經典諧音梗格式重寫，加入台味手搖延伸

zh-tw.content:
朋友問我：「你今天要不要去運動？」
我聽成：「你今天要不要喝大杯？」

聽力沒問題，是心比較誠實。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在被揪去健身房之前傳給朋友，順便附上飲料菜單截圖
variations: 進階版：他再問一次，我聽成「要不要加珍珠」，我說好，然後人就出現在飲料店。
後續：醫生說我的聽力沒退化，是大腦的甜點過濾器太強。

en.content:
Friend: 'Do you want to go work out today?'
What I heard: 'Do you want a large with extra toppings today?'

My hearing is fine. My heart is just more honest.
en.editorNote: Send this to a friend right before they try to drag you to the gym — bonus points for attaching a drink menu
variations: Upgrade: he asked again. I heard 'extra pearls?', said yes, and somehow ended up at the bubble tea shop.
Follow-up: the doctor confirmed my hearing is fine. My brain's dessert filter is just abnormally strong.

items.sourceNote: 「I do squats so my snacks have a nice shelf」格式重寫，加入台味鹹酥雞延伸

zh-tw.content:
我每天認真做深蹲，
是為了讓我的零食有一個漂亮的櫃子可以放。

肌肉只是順便練出來的，主角從來都是冰箱。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給運動完一定要去買鹹酥雞的朋友——這就是他的訓練哲學
variations: 進階版：今天深蹲多做十下，是因為昨天多買了一包餅乾。
後續：教練問我目標，我說想讓櫃子再多裝兩層。

en.content:
I do squats every day
so my snacks have a nice shelf to sit on.

The muscles are a side effect. The fridge has always been the main character.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who always grabs late-night fries after the gym — this is literally their training philosophy
variations: Upgrade: did ten extra squats today because I bought an extra bag of chips yesterday.
Follow-up: trainer asked about my goals. I said I want the shelf to hold two more layers.

items.sourceNote: 「I followed my heart, and it led me to the fridge」格式重寫，加入導航設定梗

zh-tw.content:
他們叫我跟著自己的心走，
結果我的心把我帶到了冰箱前面。

所以說我心地很好，目標明確，從不繞路。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在半夜一點傳到減肥群組，附上一張冰箱開著的照片
variations: 進階版：手機 Google Maps 的「常去地點」第一名是冰箱，第二名是便利商店。
後續：我把冰箱設為家，把家設為臨時休息站。

en.content:
They told me to follow my heart.
My heart led me directly to the fridge.

So really, I'm a person with clear values, sharp goals, and zero detours.
en.editorNote: Send to the diet group chat at 1 a.m. with a photo of an open fridge
variations: Upgrade: my Google Maps 'frequent places' lists the fridge first and the convenience store second.
Follow-up: I set the fridge as 'home' and my actual home as a temporary rest stop.

items.sourceNote: 「Inside some of us is a thin person struggling to get out」格式重寫，反向加入餵食設定

zh-tw.content:
我體內住著一個想瘦下來的我，
她每次想出來，我就餵她一塊蛋糕讓她安靜。

我們相處得很好，她最近還學會主動點外送。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在週末下午茶傳給朋友，配一張甜點照
variations: 進階版：她想抗議的時候，我就升級成提拉米蘇套餐，立刻和平。
後續：她已經不想出來了，現在改成幫我選宵夜口味。

en.content:
There's a thinner version of me living inside.
Every time she tries to come out, I feed her a slice of cake and she quiets down.

We get along great. Lately she's even started ordering delivery on her own.
en.editorNote: Send during weekend afternoon tea, paired with a dessert photo
variations: Upgrade: when she tries to protest, I upgrade her to tiramisu. Instant peace.
Follow-up: she's stopped trying to escape. Now she just helps me pick the late-night snack.

items.sourceNote: 「I'm into fitness. Fittin' this pizza in my mouth」經典諧音梗重寫，加入台味雞排版本

zh-tw.content:
我最近迷上健身，
主要是研究怎麼把一整塊雞排塞進嘴巴裡。

姿勢、呼吸、節奏都很講究，跟舉重一樣專業。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每次健身完都要去夜市的朋友——他會說這才是完整訓練
variations: 進階版：我也練胸——主要是擴胸給雞排留位置。
後續：教練說我的核心很穩，是因為一手拿珍奶一手拿雞排還能走直線。

en.content:
I'm really into fitness lately.
Mainly the study of fitting an entire fried chicken cutlet into my mouth.

Posture, breathing, rhythm — I take it as seriously as a deadlift.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who hits the night market right after every workout — they'll call this a complete training cycle
variations: Upgrade: I train chest too — mostly expanding it to make room for the cutlet.
Follow-up: my coach says my core is rock solid, because I can walk a straight line holding bubble tea and chicken at the same time.

items.sourceNote: 「My favorite machine at the gym is the vending machine」經典梗重寫並本地化

zh-tw.content:
問我健身房裡最愛的器材是哪一台？
答案是門口那台自動販賣機。

操作簡單、回饋立即、肌肉痠痛時還會給你一罐運動飲料補償你。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合貼在剛辦完年費會員的限動，搭配一張罐裝飲料的特寫
variations: 進階版：第二名是更衣室的吹風機，因為它是唯一不會讓我覺得自己很弱的機器。
後續：我已經研究出最有效率的訓練菜單——投幣、按鈕、彎腰撿。

en.content:
Ask me which machine at the gym is my favorite?
It's the vending machine by the front door.

Simple inputs, instant feedback, and when my muscles ache it hands me a sports drink as compensation.
en.editorNote: Perfect for a story post right after signing the annual membership, ideally paired with a close-up of a canned drink
variations: Runner-up: the locker room hair dryer, the only machine that has never made me feel weak.
Follow-up: I've engineered the most efficient workout split — coin in, button press, bend to retrieve.

items.sourceNote: 「The only time to eat diet food is while you're waiting for the steak to cook」格式重寫成台味滷肉飯版本

zh-tw.content:
減肥餐什麼時候吃最有效？
答案是：等滷肉飯外送來的那 25 分鐘。

那是一天當中我熱量缺口最大、毅力最強、最像在減肥的黃金 25 分鐘。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在點完外送的瞬間傳到群組，配一張地瓜的照片
variations: 進階版：水煮蛋的價值，是讓你在等炸雞排的時候有一個交代。
後續：減肥日記第一條：今天減肥減了 25 分鐘，後面 23 小時 35 分鐘維持原樣。

en.content:
When is diet food most effective?
Answer: during the 25 minutes you're waiting for the braised pork rice to be delivered.

That is the golden 25 minutes of the day with the biggest calorie deficit, the strongest willpower, and the most diet-like behavior.
en.editorNote: Drop into the group chat the second you finish placing the delivery order, with a photo of a sweet potato
variations: Upgrade: the whole point of a boiled egg is to give you an alibi while you wait for the fried chicken cutlet.
Follow-up: diet journal entry one — dieted for 25 minutes today, kept it real for the other 23 hours and 35 minutes.

items.sourceNote: 「Stressed spelled backwards is desserts」經典反轉梗，加入中文諧音延伸

zh-tw.content:
英文老師說：stressed 倒著拼就是 desserts。
所以科學上來看，吃甜點是為了把壓力倒過來。

我每天倒三次壓力，公司同事都覺得我心理素質很好。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在週一早上 10 點傳給辦公室戰友，配上一張你桌上的甜點照
variations: 進階版：我最近壓力很大，所以我倒著吃了一整盒馬卡龍。
後續：心理師建議我學會釋放壓力，我已經學會了——往嘴巴裡釋放。

en.content:
My English teacher pointed out: 'stressed' spelled backwards is 'desserts'.
So scientifically, eating dessert is just reversing your stress.

I reverse my stress three times a day. My coworkers think I'm emotionally very stable.
en.editorNote: Send to office allies at 10 a.m. on a Monday, paired with a photo of the snack on your desk
variations: Upgrade: I've been under heavy stress lately, so I reversed an entire box of macarons.
Follow-up: my therapist told me to learn to release my stress. I have — I release it directly into my mouth.

items.sourceNote: 「Day 1: lifted weights. Day 2: can't lift my arms to shampoo my hair」格式重寫，加入洗頭洗到一半的情境

zh-tw.content:
第一天：我去健身房舉了一點重訓，覺得自己變強了。
第二天：我洗頭洗到一半，手抬不起來，泡沫在頭上靜止了三分鐘。

那三分鐘，我認真考慮過要不要直接拿吹風機把它吹乾。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每次重訓隔天都消失的朋友——他會說這就是進步的證明
variations: 進階版：第三天我學會用下巴轉水龍頭，這也是一種核心訓練。
後續：教練問我為什麼缺席，我說我手還卡在頭髮上沒下來。

en.content:
Day 1: I lifted a little at the gym and felt myself getting stronger.
Day 2: I was washing my hair, couldn't raise my arms, and the suds sat frozen on my head for three minutes.

During those three minutes, I seriously considered just blow-drying it off.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who ghosts the day after every lifting session — they'll call this proof of progress
variations: Upgrade: by day three I figured out how to turn the faucet on with my chin. That's core work too.
Follow-up: my coach asked why I skipped class. I said my hands were still stuck in my hair.

items.sourceNote: 「Inside some of us is a thin person struggling to get out, but they can usually be sedated with chocolate cake」格式重寫，加入台灣甜點情境

zh-tw.content:
我身體裡住著一個瘦子，她每天都想出來看世界。
但每次她快爬到喉嚨的時候，我就拿一塊珍奶蛋糕把她哄回去。

她現在很穩定，已經三年沒吵著要出來了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每次點飲料都加珍珠的朋友——她會說瘦子應該換房客了
variations: 進階版：我跟瘦子最近達成共識，夏天她出來透氣，冬天我負責保暖她。
後續：朋友問瘦子近況，我說她最近在練習冬眠。

en.content:
There's a thin person living inside me who wants to come out and see the world.
But every time she crawls up near my throat, I sedate her with a slice of bubble tea cake.

She's very stable now. She hasn't asked to come out in three years.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who adds pearls to every drink — she'll suggest the thin person needs a new landlord
variations: Upgrade: the thin person and I reached an agreement — she gets summer, I keep her warm in winter.
Follow-up: a friend asked how she's doing. I said she's been practicing hibernation.

items.sourceNote: 「The only way to lose weight is to check it as airline baggage」概念重寫，改為台灣旅遊情境

zh-tw.content:
我想到一個快速減肥的方法：把脂肪當行李托運。
下次出國的時候，櫃台小姐說超重 5 公斤，我就把腰圍上那一圈拆下來，貼上易碎品的貼紙。

回程的時候再領回來，這樣連旅遊保險都不用買。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在訂機票的時候傳到家族群組，配上一張你最近吃太好的午餐照
