items.sourceNote: 「減肥時情緒像雲霄飛車：不吃頭暈,吃飽愧疚」哏重寫

zh-tw.content:
減肥期間的心情，是一台沒有安全帶的雲霄飛車。

沒吃：頭暈、手抖、看誰都像一塊雞排。
吃飽：罪惡感衝上來，開始懷疑人生。

而它唯一不會帶你去的地方，就是瘦。
zh-tw.editorNote: 晚上十一點對著外送 App 猶豫時，傳給同樣在掙扎的戰友
variations: 這台車最壞的地方是,它二十四小時營業,而且不准你下車。
結論:不吃也痛苦,吃了也痛苦,那不如先把這碗吃完再痛苦。

en.content:
Your mood on a diet is a roller coaster with no seatbelt.

Didn't eat: dizzy, shaky, and everyone around you starts looking like a piece of fried chicken.
Ate: the guilt rushes in and you begin questioning your entire life.

The one place this ride never takes you is thin.
en.editorNote: Send to a fellow struggler at 11pm while you're both staring at the delivery app
variations: The worst part of this ride is it's open 24 hours and won't let you off.
Conclusion: suffering if I don't eat, suffering if I do — might as well finish this bowl and suffer after.

items.sourceNote: 「明天開始減肥」永遠在明天的拖延哏,原創語錄

zh-tw.content:
我的減肥計畫一直都很完整，唯一的小問題是它永遠安排在「明天」。

而「明天」是一個我從來沒去過的地方，
因為每次太陽升起，它就被自動順延成下一個明天。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每週日晚上都信誓旦旦、每週一早上都按掉鬧鐘的朋友
variations: 我已經為「明天的我」存了三年的待辦清單,他到現在還沒上班。
好消息是我的減肥計畫從不失敗,因為它根本還沒開始。

en.content:
My diet plan has always been flawless. The only tiny problem is it's permanently scheduled for 'tomorrow.'

And 'tomorrow' is a place I've never actually visited,
because every time the sun comes up, it quietly reschedules itself to the next tomorrow.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who makes solemn vows every Sunday night and hits snooze every Monday morning
variations: I've been saving a to-do list for 'tomorrow me' for three years now. He still hasn't clocked in.
Good news: my diet plan never fails, because it hasn't actually started yet.

items.sourceNote: Dolly Parton「我試過書裡每種減肥法，連書都吃了」哏重寫，改成台灣情境

zh-tw.content:
我試過所有的減肥法。
書上寫的試過，書上沒寫的也試過，
最後我把那本減肥書也吃了。

老實說，那本書比書裡介紹的任何一餐都好吃。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給家裡囤了三本減肥書、體重卻一本都沒少的朋友
variations: 下集預告：我打算把健身房的會員手冊也加菜，反正它放著也是放著。
結論：知識可以吃進腦袋，也可以吃進肚子，我選了後者。

en.content:
I've tried every diet out there.
The ones in the books, the ones that weren't in any book,
and eventually I just ate the diet book itself.

Honestly, that book tasted better than any meal it recommended.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who owns three diet books and has lost zero pounds
variations: Next episode: I'm thinking of seasoning the gym membership handbook too. It's just sitting there anyway.
Conclusion: knowledge can go into your brain or into your stomach. I picked the stomach.

items.sourceNote: Totie Fields「減肥兩週只減掉十四天」哏重寫，原創延伸

zh-tw.content:
我已經認真減肥兩個禮拜了。

到目前為止，我成功減掉了十四天。

體重一公斤都沒動，但日曆瘦得飛快。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在減肥滿兩週、毫無進展的那個早上發限動配體重計照片
variations: 更新：減到第三週時，我又額外瘦掉了七天，效率穩定。
好消息是只要繼續這樣下去，我遲早會減到生日。

en.content:
I've been seriously dieting for two whole weeks now.

So far I've successfully lost fourteen days.

The scale hasn't budged a single kilo, but the calendar is melting away.
en.editorNote: Post this to your story on the morning you hit two weeks with zero progress, paired with a scale photo
variations: Update: in week three I shed an additional seven days. The efficiency is remarkably consistent.
Good news is, if I keep this up, I'll eventually lose all the way to my birthday.

items.sourceNote: 「卡路里是衣櫃裡的小生物，每晚把衣服縫小一點」哏重寫，原創角色

zh-tw.content:
卡路里是一種住在你衣櫃裡的小生物。

每天半夜你睡著以後，牠們就悄悄爬出來，
把你所有的褲頭往內縫進去一公分。

你以為是你變胖，其實是牠們在加班。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個堅持「不是我胖，是洗衣機把衣服洗縮了」的朋友
variations: 牠們最近升級了，連我去年買的彈性褲都搞定了，敬業精神令人佩服。
我打算在衣櫃裡放陷阱，但我怕抓到的是上禮拜的宵夜。

en.content:
Calories are tiny creatures that live in your closet.

Every night after you fall asleep, they quietly crawl out
and sew one extra centimeter off the waistband of every pair of pants you own.

You think you're gaining weight. Really, they're just working overtime.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who insists 'I'm not bigger, the dryer shrunk everything'
variations: They recently leveled up and got through my stretchy pants from last year too. Truly dedicated workers.
I'm thinking of setting a trap in my closet, but I'm scared I'll catch last week's midnight snack.

items.sourceNote: 「減肥最難的不是看著自己吃，是看著別人吃」哏重寫，原創延伸

zh-tw.content:
減肥最難的部分，從來不是管住自己的嘴。

是坐在你對面那個人，
一邊吃著炸雞配珍奶，一邊問你：「你確定不來一口？」

那一口，是壓垮我意志力的最後一根薯條。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每次聚餐都點滿桌、還一直勸你吃的那位損友
variations: 我已經練到能微笑說「不用」，但我的胃在桌底下默默踹了我三腳。
解決辦法是約那種也在減肥的朋友吃飯，這樣我們就能一起痛苦地看菜單。

en.content:
The hardest part of a diet was never watching what you eat.

It's the person sitting across from you,
chomping on fried chicken with a bubble tea, asking: 'You sure you don't want a bite?'

That one bite is the last fry that breaks my willpower's back.
en.editorNote: Send to the so-called friend who orders the whole menu and keeps offering you some
variations: I've trained myself to smile and say 'I'm good,' but my stomach is kicking me three times under the table.
The fix is to only eat out with friends who are also dieting, so we can suffer over the menu together.

items.sourceNote: 「late-night cravings 1, willpower 0」比分格式重寫，加凌晨內心戲在地化

zh-tw.content:
凌晨兩點，賽事最終比分出爐：

宵夜的慾望：1
我的意志力：0

裁判是冰箱，它在我打開門的那一刻，就已經吹了終場哨。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每晚都在跟冰箱談判失敗的朋友，最好配一張泡麵的照片
variations: 賽後訪問：我的意志力表示，它其實連板凳都還沒坐熱就被換下場了。
明天一定贏。這句話我已經連續說了一整個球季。

en.content:
Two a.m. The final score is in:

Midnight cravings: 1
My willpower: 0

The referee was the fridge, and it blew the final whistle the second I opened the door.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who loses every nightly negotiation with the fridge, ideally with a photo of instant noodles
variations: Post-game interview: my willpower says it got subbed off before the bench even warmed up.
Tomorrow I'll win for sure. I've said that every game this entire season.

items.sourceNote: 「my summer body is in progress since last summer」格式重寫，加台灣季節在地化

zh-tw.content:
有人問我夏天的身材準備得怎樣了。

我說：很順利，正在進行中——從去年夏天開始進行。

目前進度條卡在 3%，而且每次靠近泳池就會自動歸零。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每年五月都說「來得及」、六月就改口「明年吧」的朋友
variations: 更新：我的夏日身材決定跳過今年，直接挑戰二○二七夏季限定款。
好消息是我已經買好泳褲，壞消息是它跟我一樣只想躺在陰涼處。

en.content:
Someone asked how my summer body is coming along.

I said: great, it's in progress — it has been in progress since last summer.

The progress bar is stuck at 3%, and it resets to zero every time I get near a pool.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who says 'still time' every May and switches to 'maybe next year' by June
variations: Update: my summer body has decided to skip this year and go straight for the 2027 limited edition.
Good news, I already bought the swim trunks. Bad news, they want to lie in the shade as much as I do.

items.sourceNote: 「if nobody sees you eating it, it doesn't count」格式重寫，加台灣站著吃在地化

zh-tw.content:
我的減肥科學體系，建立在三條鐵律上：

一、沒人看到我吃的，不算。
二、站著吃的，熱量會自己掉光。
三、別人盤子裡夾來的，是對方的卡路里。

根據這套理論，我今天其實沒吃東西。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那種偷吃完還會一臉無辜的朋友——他會默默點頭認同第三條
variations: 補充條款第四條：切成兩半的蛋糕熱量只剩一半，這是數學。
唯一的漏洞是體重計不承認我的理論，我們已經冷戰一週了。

en.content:
My entire diet science rests on three iron laws:

One, if nobody sees me eat it, it doesn't count.
Two, anything eaten standing up burns its own calories off.
Three, food snagged from someone else's plate is their calories, not mine.

By this theory, I technically didn't eat anything today.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who finishes a secret snack and still looks innocent — they'll quietly nod at rule three
variations: Amendment four: a cake cut in half has half the calories. That's just math.
The only flaw is that the scale refuses to acknowledge my theory. We've been giving each other the silent treatment for a week.

items.sourceNote: 「abs are made in the kitchen but destroyed by pizza」格式重寫，加台灣鹹酥雞在地化

zh-tw.content:
教練說：腹肌是在廚房裡練出來的。

我認真聽進去了，於是今晚走進廚房，
親手打開了一包鹹酥雞，配一杯微糖去冰的奶茶。

結論：腹肌確實是在廚房誕生的，只是我每天晚上又親手把它埋回去。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給說要練線條、宵夜卻從沒斷過的健身房戰友
variations: 進階版：我的腹肌不是六塊，是一塊——而且它很有保護意識，外面裹了一層厚厚的脂肪防護罩。
好消息是我今天有去健身房，壞消息是回家路上鹹酥雞攤剛好開門。

en.content:
My trainer said: abs are made in the kitchen.

I took that to heart, so tonight I walked into the kitchen
and personally opened a bag of fried chicken bites with a half-sweet, no-ice milk tea.

Conclusion: abs really are born in the kitchen. I just bury them again with my own two hands every night.
en.editorNote: Send to the gym buddy who talks about definition but never skips a midnight snack
variations: Pro version: I don't have a six-pack, I have a one-pack — and it's very protective, wrapped in a thick layer of fat for safety.
Good news, I made it to the gym today. Bad news, the snack stall was just opening as I walked home.

items.sourceNote: 「I've been on a diet for two weeks and all I've lost is 14 days」格式重寫，加台灣在地語氣

zh-tw.content:
我已經很認真地減肥兩個禮拜了。

盤點一下這段時間的成果：
我失去了十四天的快樂、
失去了三場可以吃到飽的聚餐、
還失去了一段跟蛋糕的美好友情。

至於體重，它一公斤都沒少，還在原地，對我比讚。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每次量完體重就想刪掉減肥 App 的朋友
variations: 更新：第十五天我決定休息一下，結果這一休，就把前面失去的快樂全部一次補回來了。
體重計很忠誠，無論我多努力，它都堅持給我同一個數字，從不背叛。

en.content:
I've been dieting very seriously for two whole weeks.

Let me take stock of what I've achieved:
I've lost fourteen days of joy,
lost three all-you-can-eat dinners with friends,
and lost a beautiful friendship with cake.

As for the weight — not a single kilo gone. It's still right where it was, giving me a thumbs up.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who wants to delete the diet app every time they step off the scale
variations: Update: on day fifteen I decided to take a little break, and in that one break I recovered all the joy I'd lost at once.
The scale is loyal. No matter how hard I try, it insists on the same number and never betrays me.

items.sourceNote: 「省電模式」自嘲梗重寫，改成走去冰箱的場景

zh-tw.content:
我不是懶，我是進入省電模式。
身體正在儲備能量，準備迎接今天最偉大的冒險——
從沙發走到冰箱，再走回來。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合躺平週末發限動，配一張自己窩在沙發的照片
variations: 進階版：來回三趟之後，我決定把零食直接搬到沙發旁邊，節能又環保。

en.content:
I'm not lazy, I'm in power-saving mode.
My body is storing energy for today's greatest adventure:
walking from the couch to the fridge, and back again.
en.editorNote: Perfect for a lazy-weekend story, paired with a photo of you melting into the sofa
variations: Pro tier: after three round trips I just moved the snacks next to the couch. Energy-efficient and eco-friendly.

items.sourceNote: 「心想瘦、胃想吃」內戰格式重寫成擬人對決

zh-tw.content:
我的心一直想減肥，我的胃一直想吃。
它們每天在我體內開戰，
結果三百場下來，胃從來沒輸過。

我只負責收屍，還有付帳單。
zh-tw.editorNote: 宵夜時段傳給那個說好要一起減肥、結果先點餐的損友
variations: 戰報更新：今天心連談判桌都還沒坐下，胃已經幫我把炸雞點好了。

en.content:
My heart wants to lose weight. My stomach wants to eat.
They go to war inside me every single day,
and after three hundred battles, my stomach has never lost once.

I just clean up the bodies and pay the bill.
en.editorNote: Send during late-night snack hour to the friend who swore you'd diet together, then ordered first
variations: Battle report: today my heart hadn't even reached the table before my stomach had already ordered the fried chicken.

items.sourceNote: 「健身房遇到身材好的人」Jim Gaffigan 梗的厭世改寫，去掉人名

zh-tw.content:
健身房裡最讓人崩潰的，是那種身材已經完美的人。
我超想問他：你來幹嘛？你已經畢業了啊。

我們這種還在補考的，才需要待在這裡。
zh-tw.editorNote: 健身房報到後第一天厭世發文，配一張器材說明書看不懂的照片
variations: 後來我發現他每天都來，於是我懂了：原來這裡是他的家，我只是來參觀的。

en.content:
The most demoralizing person at the gym is the one who already looks perfect.
I want to ask: what are you even doing here? You graduated.

Those of us still failing the makeup exam are the ones who need to be here.
en.editorNote: Post on day one of your gym membership, ideally with a photo of you squinting at a machine's instructions
variations: Then I realized he comes every day, so it finally clicked: this place is his home. I'm just a tourist.

items.sourceNote: 「動力放假去了」概念重寫成請假單格式

zh-tw.content:
今天本來要運動的，但我的動力臨時請了假。
我查了一下，它的假單上寫：「事假，去找一個更瘦的主人。」

准了。反正我也不敢不准。
zh-tw.editorNote: 減肥週的星期一傳給同樣在拖的同事，互相掩護一下
variations: 後續：動力銷假回來那天，剛好是我又胖三公斤的那天，它看了一眼就說它要離職。

en.content:
I was going to work out today, but my motivation called in sick.
I checked its leave request. It said: 'Personal day. Going to find a thinner owner.'

Approved. Honestly, I didn't dare reject it.
en.editorNote: Send to a coworker on the Monday of diet week so you can cover for each other
variations: Follow-up: the day my motivation came back was the exact day I'd gained three kilos. It took one look and handed in its resignation.

items.sourceNote: 「苦的時候吃顆糖」毒雞湯梗重寫，保留反轉結尾

zh-tw.content:
他們說人生苦的時候，就吃顆糖吧。
於是我吃了。
人生沒有變甜，
我只是從一個苦的人，變成一個苦的胖子。
zh-tw.editorNote: 心情低落又嘴饞的深夜適用，配一張甜點外送的截圖
variations: 升級版：後來我改吃一整盒，發現人生還是苦的，但至少這盒是甜的。

en.content:
They say when life gets bitter, just eat some candy.
So I did.
Life didn't get any sweeter.
I just went from being a bitter person to a bitter fat person.
en.editorNote: For a low, snack-craving late night, paired with a screenshot of your dessert delivery order
variations: Upgrade: later I ate the whole box. Life was still bitter, but at least the box was sweet.

items.sourceNote: 「海鮮減肥法 see food and eat it」經典雙關重寫，換成中文可成立的版本

zh-tw.content:
朋友問我最近在減肥嗎，我說有啊，我在執行「看到法」。
他說那是什麼飲食法？
我說很簡單——看到食物，就把它吃掉。

目前執行得非常徹底，零失誤。
zh-tw.editorNote: 聚餐被問減肥進度時的標準回覆，講完繼續夾菜最自然
variations: 進階版：後來我升級成「聞到法」，連看都不用看，香味飄過來就算數。

en.content:
A friend asked if I'm dieting these days. I said yes, I'm on the 'see-it' plan.
He asked what kind of diet that is.
I said it's simple — I see food, and I eat it.

So far I'm following it perfectly. Zero misses.
en.editorNote: The standard answer when someone asks about your diet progress mid-meal — sounds best if you keep eating while you say it
variations: Advanced version: I've upgraded to the 'smell-it' plan. I don't even need to see it. If the aroma drifts over, it counts.

items.sourceNote: 「兩週減肥只減掉十四天」Totie Fields 名句重寫，保留時間反轉笑點

zh-tw.content:
我已經認真減肥整整一個月了。
成果盤點：體重沒掉，腰圍沒掉，臉沒掉。

唯一確定減掉的，是這三十天，還有我對自己的最後一點信任。
zh-tw.editorNote: 月底對著體重計嘆氣時自嘲用，配一張月曆截圖更有畫面
variations: 補充：仔細算了一下，這個月我唯一瘦下來的部位，是錢包。

en.content:
I've been seriously dieting for a whole month now.
Results so far: weight didn't drop, waist didn't drop, face didn't drop.

The only thing I definitely lost was these thirty days — and the last bit of trust I had in myself.
en.editorNote: For self-mockery while sighing at the scale at month's end; pairs well with a screenshot of the calendar
variations: Footnote: I did the math. The only part of me that got thinner this month was my wallet.

items.sourceNote: 「卡路里是衣櫃裡的小生物半夜把衣服改小」格式重寫，擬人化保留

zh-tw.content:
我終於發現衣櫃裡住了一群卡路里。
它們白天躲著不出聲，每天半夜偷偷把我所有的褲頭改窄兩公分。

我跟它們協商過很多次，它們從來不談判，只負責加班。
zh-tw.editorNote: 穿不下去年牛仔褲那天傳給朋友，附一張卡住的拉鍊照
variations: 後續調查：經查它們是領加班費的，薪水從我每天的宵夜帳單裡扣。

en.content:
I finally figured out there's a colony of calories living in my closet.
They hide quietly all day, then sneak out every midnight to take my waistbands in by two centimeters.

I've tried to negotiate with them many times. They never bargain. They just work overtime.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend the day last year's jeans won't go on, with a photo of the stuck zipper
variations: Update from the investigation: turns out they get paid overtime. It's deducted straight from my nightly snack bill.

items.sourceNote: 「站在沙拉面前求它變甜甜圈」格式重寫，換成台灣語境的祈求對象

zh-tw.content:
中午我站在一碗水煮花椰菜面前，用盡全身的誠意對它許願。
我說：拜託你，變成一塊雞排就好。

它沒有變。它只是更綠了一點，好像在嘲笑我。
zh-tw.editorNote: 減脂餐吃到第三天崩潰時傳給戰友，配一張慘白便當照
variations: 三秒後續：我閉上眼再睜開，它真的變了——變涼了。

en.content:
At lunch I stood in front of a bowl of boiled broccoli and wished at it with everything I had.
I said: please, just turn into one piece of fried chicken.

It didn't change. It just got a little greener, like it was laughing at me.
en.editorNote: Send to your diet buddy when you crack on day three of clean eating, with a photo of the sad pale meal prep
variations: Three seconds later: I closed my eyes and opened them again. It really did change — it got cold.

items.sourceNote: 「該減的不是肥而是慾望」減肥毒雞湯格式重寫，保留反向毒舌結構

zh-tw.content:
他們說：你該減的不是肥，是慾望。
我認真想了三秒，覺得很有道理。

於是我成功減掉了「明天再減」的慾望，今天先吃。
慾望沒了，肥還在，我們達成和解。
zh-tw.editorNote: 看到別人發勵志減肥文時，回一句這個自嘲最對味
variations: 後記：減掉慾望的那天，我順便把減肥這個念頭也一起減掉了，整個人輕鬆超多。

en.content:
They say: the thing you need to lose isn't the weight, it's the cravings.
I thought about it seriously for three seconds and decided they had a point.

So I successfully lost the craving to 'start tomorrow,' and ate today instead.
The craving is gone, the weight stayed, and we've made peace.
en.editorNote: When someone posts an inspirational diet message, reply with this for the perfect self-deprecating energy
variations: Epilogue: the day I lost the cravings, I threw out the whole idea of dieting too. Honestly, I feel so much lighter now.

items.sourceNote: 「I'm on a seafood diet, I see food and I eat it」海鮮諧音梗格式重寫，換成台灣語境

zh-tw.content:
有人問我在執行什麼飲食法。
我說：我吃的是「看見法」。

運作原理很簡單——看見食物，我就把它吃掉。
目前執行率百分之百，從來沒有失敗過。
zh-tw.editorNote: 朋友認真問你最近在減什麼的時候，用這句回他最歡樂
variations: 進階版：我還搭配「聞到法」，只要聞得到味道也算數，所以我永遠在進食中。

en.content:
Someone asked what diet I'm following.
I said: I'm on the 'See It' diet.

The mechanism is simple — I see food, and I eat it.
My compliance rate is one hundred percent. I have never once failed.
en.editorNote: When a friend seriously asks what plan you're on, reply with this for maximum comedic effect
variations: Advanced version: I pair it with the 'Smell It' protocol — if I can smell it, it counts, so I'm technically always eating.

items.sourceNote: 「The first thing you lose on a diet is brain mass」格式重寫，保留反差結構

zh-tw.content:
減肥的時候，你第一個瘦下來的部位通常不是肚子。
是腦子。

餓到第三天，我已經想不起來自己當初為什麼要減肥了，
只記得冰箱裡還有半塊蛋糕。
zh-tw.editorNote: 減脂期腦袋當機時發限動，配一張你盯著冰箱的照片
variations: 後續：腦子瘦完之後，我做了一個非常理性的決定——把那半塊蛋糕吃掉，避免它孤單。

en.content:
When you're on a diet, the first part of you to slim down usually isn't your belly.
It's your brain.

By day three of being hungry, I can no longer remember why I started this,
but I do remember there's half a cake in the fridge.
en.editorNote: Post this when your brain short-circuits mid-diet, with a photo of you staring into the fridge
variations: Follow-up: once my brain finished slimming down, I made a very rational decision — eat the half cake so it wouldn't be lonely.

items.sourceNote: 「Me: I want abs. Also me: I want pizza」內心拉扯格式重寫，擴寫成對話

zh-tw.content:
我：我想要腹肌。
我（同一個我）：我想要鹽酥雞。

兩個我吵了很久，最後達成共識——
先吃鹽酥雞，腹肌我們慢慢培養感情，不急。
zh-tw.editorNote: 深夜想吃宵夜又有罪惡感時傳給戰友，他絕對懂
variations: 三天後的會議記錄：經過充分討論，雙方一致同意把腹肌計畫無限期延後，鹽酥雞照常進行。

en.content:
Me: I want abs.
Me (the same me): I want fried chicken.

The two of us argued for a long time, then reached a consensus —
eat the fried chicken first, and let the abs and me slowly build a relationship. No rush.
en.editorNote: Send to your diet buddy during a late-night craving guilt spiral — they'll get it instantly
variations: Meeting minutes, three days later: after thorough discussion, both parties agreed to postpone the abs project indefinitely. Fried chicken proceeds as scheduled.

items.sourceNote: 「不要低頭，雙下巴會掉下來」反向毒舌打氣格式重寫

zh-tw.content:
教練說：不要低頭，抬頭挺胸。
我問為什麼，他說：因為你一低頭，雙下巴就跑出來打招呼了。

我從此走路都看天花板，撞了三根柱子，但下巴只有一個，值得。
zh-tw.editorNote: 健身房戰友互相打氣（毒舌版）時最對味，配一張仰望天花板的自拍
variations: 醫生說我頸椎不太好，我說沒辦法，這是維持單一下巴的必要代價。

en.content:
My trainer said: don't look down, chin up, chest out.
I asked why. He said: because the moment you look down, your double chin pops out to say hi.

I've been walking around staring at ceilings ever since. I've hit three pillars, but I only have one chin. Worth it.
en.editorNote: Perfect for trading savage-but-loving encouragement with a gym buddy, paired with a ceiling-gazing selfie
variations: My doctor says my neck isn't doing great. I told him there's nothing I can do — it's the necessary price of maintaining a single chin.

items.sourceNote: 「胖是一天天吃來的，肥也得一天天減去」減肥金句反向自嘲重寫

zh-tw.content:
勵志文案說：胖是一天天吃來的，肥也得一天天減去，貴在堅持。
我看完非常感動，決定身體力行。

於是我堅持每天吃，目前已經連續堅持三百多天，從不間斷。
你看，我也是很有毅力的人。
zh-tw.editorNote: 看到朋友轉發勵志減肥語錄時，回這句最有反差喜感
variations: 年度總結：今年我最大的成就是把「堅持」這項美德，成功應用在錯誤的地方。

en.content:
The motivational post said: weight is gained one day at a time, and it must be lost one day at a time — the key is consistency.
I was deeply moved and decided to put it into practice.

So I've been consistently eating every single day, over three hundred days in a row now, never missing once.
See? I'm a very disciplined person too.
en.editorNote: When a friend shares an inspirational diet quote, reply with this for the perfect ironic contrast
variations: Year in review: my biggest achievement this year was successfully applying the virtue of 'consistency' to entirely the wrong thing.

items.sourceNote: 「I'm on a seafood diet — I see food and I eat it」海鮮飲食法雙關梗重寫

zh-tw.content:
有人問我在執行什麼飲食法。
我說：我在做「看到就吃」飲食法，非常科學。

原理很簡單：只要眼睛看得到食物，我就負責把它從這個世界上移除。
目前執行率百分之百，從沒失敗過。
zh-tw.editorNote: 被朋友問「你最近在減肥嗎」時回這句，比直接認輸有面子多了
variations: 進階版：這套飲食法唯一的限制是——冰箱關起來的時候我看不到，所以那幾秒算我贏。

en.content:
Someone asked me what diet I'm on.
I told them I'm on the 'see food' diet. It's extremely scientific.

The principle is simple: if my eyes can see food, I'm personally responsible for removing it from this world.
Compliance rate is one hundred percent. I've never failed once.
en.editorNote: Perfect reply when a friend asks 'are you dieting lately?' — way more dignified than just admitting defeat
variations: Advanced version: the only limitation of this diet is that I can't see the food when the fridge door is closed, so those few seconds count as a win for me.

items.sourceNote: 「I stepped on the scale, it asked for my username and password」體重計登入梗重寫

zh-tw.content:
今天早上站上體重計。
它想了三秒，然後跳出一行字：請輸入帳號密碼。

我愣了一下才明白——原來這個數字，已經高到需要驗證身分才能查看了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 量完體重心情複雜時傳到群組，大家一起苦笑最療癒
variations: 後續：我輸入密碼之後，它又問我要不要升級成企業版。

en.content:
I stepped on the scale this morning.
It thought for three seconds, then a line of text popped up: please enter your username and password.

It took me a moment to understand — apparently this number has gotten so high it now requires identity verification to view.
en.editorNote: Drop this in the group chat when your post-weigh-in mood is complicated — a shared bitter laugh is the best therapy
variations: Follow-up: after I entered my password, it asked if I wanted to upgrade to the enterprise plan.

items.sourceNote: 「I followed my heart and it led me to the fridge」跟隨內心梗重寫

zh-tw.content:
書上都說，要傾聽自己的內心，跟著感覺走。
我照做了。

我的心帶著我，一步一步，堅定地走向冰箱。
原來我的內心，一直都很清楚自己要什麼。
zh-tw.editorNote: 深夜想吃宵夜又需要正當理由時，這句能完美說服自己
variations: 心靈導師說要活在當下，而我此刻正活在一包洋芋片裡，非常充實。

en.content:
Every book says to listen to your heart and follow your feelings.
So I did.

My heart led me, step by step, firmly and without hesitation — straight to the fridge.
Turns out my inner self has always known exactly what it wants.
en.editorNote: For late nights when you want a snack and also need a legitimate excuse — this one convinces you perfectly
variations: My spiritual guide said to live in the moment, and right now I'm living inside a bag of chips. Very fulfilling.

items.sourceNote: 「I don't do squats, my relationship with gravity is already complicated」深蹲與地心引力梗重寫

zh-tw.content:
教練問我今天要不要練深蹲。
我說不了，我跟地心引力的關係已經夠複雜了，不想再刺激它。

畢竟它每天都很努力地把我往下拉，我也很努力地站著，我們現在勉強維持和平，別破壞平衡。
zh-tw.editorNote: 被健身房教練催加課表時用，既拒絕又不失幽默
variations: 教練說地心引力對每個人都一樣，我說對，但它對我特別有誠意。

en.content:
My trainer asked if I wanted to do squats today.
I said no thanks — my relationship with gravity is already complicated enough, I don't want to provoke it further.

After all, it works hard every day to pull me down, and I work hard to stay standing. We've got a fragile peace going. Let's not upset the balance.
en.editorNote: Use this when your gym trainer is pushing extra sets — declines the offer without losing the joke
variations: My trainer said gravity treats everyone the same. I said sure, but it's noticeably more devoted to me.

items.sourceNote: 「如果肥肉能賣錢我一定是世界首富」厭世致富梗重寫

zh-tw.content:
有時候我會想，如果身上的肥肉能拿去賣錢，
我大概早就是世界首富，登上財經雜誌封面了。

可惜這個世界不收，還要我倒貼健身房會費才願意幫我處理掉。
這門生意，怎麼算都是我虧。
zh-tw.editorNote: 看到帳單同時又想吃鹹酥雞的矛盾時刻，配這句最對味
variations: 更慘的是，這是唯一一種你付出愈多、庫存反而愈難清的資產。

en.content:
Sometimes I think, if the fat on my body could be sold for money,
I'd probably be the richest person in the world by now, on the cover of every finance magazine.

Unfortunately the world won't buy it, and I have to pay a gym membership just to get someone to help me dispose of it.
No matter how you run the numbers, this business is a loss for me.
en.editorNote: Perfect for that conflicted moment when you're staring at a bill and also craving fried chicken
variations: Even worse: it's the only asset where the more you invest, the harder the inventory is to clear.

items.sourceNote: 「I'm on a seafood diet, I see food and I eat it」海鮮飲食法諧音梗重寫

zh-tw.content:
很多人問我在執行什麼飲食法，我都很認真地回答：目視飲食法。
看到食物，我就把它吃掉，程序非常科學，從不拖延。

這套方法的優點是執行率百分之百，缺點是它跟減肥完全沒有關係。
zh-tw.editorNote: 被朋友問「你最近在少吃嗎」時，可以一本正經地丟這句
variations: 進階版：如果沒看到食物，我會主動打開冰箱，讓它進入我的視線範圍。

en.content:
People keep asking what diet I'm on, and I always answer very sincerely: the visual diet.
I see food, and I eat it. The process is highly scientific, and I never procrastinate.

The upside is a 100% completion rate. The downside is it has nothing to do with losing weight.
en.editorNote: Deploy with a straight face when a friend asks 'have you been eating less lately?'
variations: Advanced mode: if I don't see any food, I proactively open the fridge to bring it into view.

items.sourceNote: 「my scale and I have a toxic relationship」體重計恐怖情人格式原創

zh-tw.content:
我跟體重計的關係，說難聽一點就是恐怖情人那種。
我每天早上小心翼翼地靠近它，深怕一個動作它就翻臉，數字直接往上跳給我看。

最恐怖的是，我明明對它那麼好，天天報到，它卻從來沒對我溫柔過。
zh-tw.editorNote: 站上體重計前先深呼吸的那三秒鐘，最適合想起這句
variations: 後來我學會了：脫鞋、脫外套、吐氣、把頭髮撥開，然後假裝這些都是變因。

en.content:
My relationship with my scale is, to put it bluntly, the toxic kind.
Every morning I approach it carefully, terrified that one wrong move will set it off and send the number jumping up at me.

The scariest part is that I treat it so well — I check in daily — and it has never once been gentle with me.
en.editorNote: Best remembered during those three deep breaths before you step on the scale
variations: Eventually I learned: take off the shoes, the jacket, exhale, push the hair aside, and pretend all of it counts as variables.

items.sourceNote: 運動完獎勵自己吃更多的因果循環梗原創

zh-tw.content:
今天我運動了整整一個小時，燃燒了大概三百大卡，非常了不起。
為了獎勵自己這份努力，我吃了一份七百大卡的鹹酥雞。

我發現我不是在減肥，我是在替鹹酥雞創造正當的理由。
zh-tw.editorNote: 健身後打開外送 App 的那一刻，這句會準時浮現在腦海
variations: 數學很簡單：運動是本金，鹹酥雞是利息，而我永遠在還不完的循環裡。

en.content:
Today I worked out for a full hour and burned roughly three hundred calories. Very impressive.
To reward myself for the effort, I ate a seven-hundred-calorie basket of fried chicken.

I've realized I'm not losing weight — I'm just manufacturing legitimate excuses for fried chicken.
en.editorNote: This one shows up right on cue the moment you open a food delivery app after the gym
variations: The math is simple: exercise is the principal, fried chicken is the interest, and I'm stuck in a loop I can never pay off.

items.sourceNote: 「明天開始」的明天永遠不會來的無限期延後梗重寫

zh-tw.content:
我的減肥計畫一律從明天開始，這是我堅持了好幾年的原則，從沒破例過。
可惜的是，明天這個東西，到今天為止一次都還沒有真正到來。

我大概是全世界最有紀律的人，只是紀律全用在延後上面。
zh-tw.editorNote: 宵夜吃到一半、突然想起減肥計畫的那個瞬間，最有共感
variations: 客服回覆：您的減肥申請已收到，預計出貨日為「明天」，目前無限期延後中。

en.content:
My diet always starts tomorrow. It's a principle I've held firmly for years, without a single exception.
Unfortunately, this thing called tomorrow has, as of today, never once actually arrived.

I'm probably the most disciplined person on earth — I just spend all of that discipline on postponing.
en.editorNote: Hits hardest in that moment, halfway through a midnight snack, when you suddenly remember the diet plan
variations: Customer service reply: your diet request has been received. Estimated ship date is 'tomorrow'. Currently delayed indefinitely.

items.sourceNote: 衣櫃裡放不下的舊衣服當成「未來的動力」自我安慰梗原創

zh-tw.content:
我衣櫃裡有一件三年前買的褲子，現在完全穿不下，但我一直沒丟。
我告訴自己那不是穿不下的褲子，那是「未來的動力」。

三年過去了，動力還是掛在那裡，我還是穿現在的鬆緊帶，我們相安無事。
zh-tw.editorNote: 整理衣櫃、拿起那件穿不下的褲子又默默放回去時，這句最貼切
variations: 後來我發現，鬆緊帶才是真正懂我的朋友，它從不評論我，只默默包容。

en.content:
There's a pair of pants in my closet I bought three years ago. They don't fit at all now, but I've never thrown them out.
I tell myself those aren't pants I can't fit into — they're 'future motivation'.

Three years later, the motivation is still hanging there, I'm still in my elastic waistband, and we coexist peacefully.
en.editorNote: Perfect for the moment you're cleaning out the closet, pick up those pants that don't fit, and quietly put them back
variations: Eventually I realized the elastic waistband is the only friend who truly gets me. It never judges — it just silently accommodates.

items.sourceNote: 「節食兩週只減掉十四天」經典雙關句改寫，換成月曆撕頁的畫面

zh-tw.content:
我認真節食兩個禮拜了，成果非常穩定：
我成功減掉了整整十四天。

月曆一頁一頁地瘦，體重計一動也不動，我們各過各的。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合減肥第十四天早上站上體重計、深吸一口氣之後傳到閨蜜群組
variations: 月底結算：這個月我瘦了三十天，體重維持得非常好，一克都沒少。

en.content:
I've been dieting seriously for two weeks, and the results are remarkably stable:
I've successfully lost a full fourteen days.

The calendar gets thinner one page at a time, the scale doesn't budge, and we live completely separate lives.
en.editorNote: Perfect to drop in the group chat on day fourteen, right after you step on the scale and take a deep breath
variations: End-of-month recap: I lost thirty whole days this month. Weight held beautifully — not a single gram gone.

items.sourceNote: 「我想要腹肌／我想吃披薩」內在拉扯梗，改成兩個自己開會的格式

zh-tw.content:
早上的我：今天一定要練出腹肌，晚餐吃燙青菜。
晚上的我：披薩加雞排加珍奶，全部我請客。

兩個我每天開會，議程只有一項，而且永遠是晚上的我當主席。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個嘴上喊減肥、手裡拿宵夜的健身房戰友，他會立刻對號入座
variations: 會議結論：腹肌議案再次擱置，全體通過加點一份薯條慶祝討論圓滿。

en.content:
Morning me: today I'm definitely getting abs. Dinner is steamed vegetables.
Evening me: pizza, fried chicken, and bubble tea — my treat, all of it.

The two of me hold a meeting every day. There's one item on the agenda, and evening me always chairs it.
en.editorNote: Send to the gym buddy who preaches dieting with a midnight snack in hand — instant self-recognition
variations: Meeting minutes: the abs proposal is tabled again. Motion passed to order a side of fries to celebrate a productive discussion.

items.sourceNote: 「身體和脂肪是好朋友」老梗改寫成脂肪搬進來當室友的設定

zh-tw.content:
年輕的時候脂肪只是來我身上短住幾天，說走就走。
現在牠簽了長約，付了押金，還把家具都搬進來了。

我試著委婉暗示牠該搬走，牠只是笑笑，又幫自己加點了一份甜點。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在生日過後、褲頭默默變緊的那個星期，配一張蛋糕照傳給同齡朋友
variations: 最新進度：牠昨天問我要不要一起續約，我還沒回，牠已經先把訂金付了。

en.content:
When I was young, fat just crashed at my place for a few days and left whenever it wanted.
Now it's signed a long-term lease, paid the deposit, and moved all its furniture in.

I've tried gently hinting that it should move out. It just smiles and orders itself another dessert.
en.editorNote: Great for the week after your birthday when your waistband quietly tightens — pair with a cake photo and send to a friend your age
variations: Latest update: yesterday it asked if I wanted to renew the lease together. Before I could answer, it had already paid the down payment.

items.sourceNote: 「運動是為了無罪惡感吃甜點」梗改成運動與宵夜的匯率換算格式

zh-tw.content:
我今天跑了五公里，燒掉三百大卡，非常有成就感。
回家路上順手買了一杯珍奶、一份雞排，總共八百大卡。

運動和宵夜之間的匯率一直對我不利，但我還是每天堅持兌換。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合運動完在便利商店猶豫三秒、最後還是拿了那杯飲料時傳給自己看
variations: 理財建議：以這個匯率換下去，我這輩子都存不到腹肌，但心靈非常富足。

en.content:
I ran five kilometers today and burned three hundred calories. Very satisfying.
On the way home I casually grabbed a bubble tea and some fried chicken — eight hundred calories total.

The exchange rate between exercise and midnight snacks has never been in my favor, but I keep making the trade every single day.
en.editorNote: Send to yourself for the moment you hesitate for three seconds at the convenience store after a workout, then grab the drink anyway
variations: Financial advice: at this exchange rate I'll never save up for abs, but my soul is extremely wealthy.

items.sourceNote: internal only

zh-tw.content: 減重不是跟食物打仗，而是學會跟自己的身體好好說話。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合放在健康社群貼文，傳遞不極端、重視傾聽身體的減重觀念。
variations: 瘦下來的關鍵，往往不是少吃，而是更懂得聽身體想說什麼。
別把減重當成戰爭，把它當成一段重新認識自己的過程。

en.content: Losing weight isn't a war against food—it's learning to have an honest conversation with your own body.
en.editorNote: Great for a wellness caption that rejects extreme dieting and promotes body awareness.
variations: The real trick to slimming down usually isn't eating less, it's listening better.
Stop treating weight loss like a battle and start treating it like getting to know yourself again.

items.sourceNote: internal only

zh-tw.content: 今天多走的那幾步、少喝的那杯手搖，明天都會偷偷替你加分。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合運動或飲食打卡貼文，用輕鬆語氣鼓勵累積小習慣。
variations: 進步是零錢存出來的，今天少一杯糖，明天多一分底氣。
別小看那些微不足道的選擇，它們正在慢慢改寫你的身材。

en.content: The extra steps you take today and the sugary drink you skip will quietly pay you back tomorrow.
en.editorNote: Fits a fitness or meal check-in post; light tone that celebrates tiny habits.
variations: Progress is saved up in loose change—skip the sugar today, feel it tomorrow.
Don't underestimate the small choices; they're slowly rewriting your shape.

items.sourceNote: internal only

zh-tw.content: 允許自己偶爾放縱，不是失敗，而是讓這條路走得更久的祕訣。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合分享給正在節食、容易因為吃一頓大餐就放棄的人。
variations: 吃一頓大餐不會毀掉一切，把它當成充電，明天繼續就好。
真正能長久的飲食，是留得下彈性的飲食。

en.content: Letting yourself indulge once in a while isn't failure—it's the secret to going the distance.
en.editorNote: For anyone dieting who tends to quit after one big meal.
variations: One big meal won't undo everything; treat it as a recharge and pick back up tomorrow.
The diet that lasts is the one that leaves room to breathe.

items.sourceNote: 經典「海鮮飲食法 see food and eat it」雙關重寫

zh-tw.content:
有人問我在執行什麼飲食法，
我很認真地回答：海鮮飲食法。

就是「看見食物就吃」的那種海鮮。
zh-tw.editorNote: 自拍配美食照的萬用貼文，發限動絕對有人已讀秒回哈哈哈
variations: 營養師問我三餐怎麼吃，我說：看到什麼吃什麼，這叫隨緣飲食法。
我的減肥計畫很科學，主要看冰箱裡剩下什麼。

en.content:
Someone asked what diet I'm on.
I told them, very seriously: the seafood diet.

The kind where I see food and I eat it.
en.editorNote: Perfect caption for a food selfie — post it to your story and watch the replies roll in
variations: My nutritionist asked about my meal plan. I said I eat whatever I see. It's called the go-with-the-flow diet.
My weight loss plan is very scientific. It mostly depends on what's left in the fridge.

items.sourceNote: 經典「減肥第二天比較容易，因為你已經放棄了」格式重寫

zh-tw.content:
大家都說減肥第一天最難。
其實第二天超級輕鬆——

因為到了第二天，我已經不減了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合週一發，配一張早餐店大冰奶的照片最有戲
variations: 我的減肥計畫最大的優點就是：從來沒撐過三天，所以永遠不會累。
堅持是很重要的，可惜我只堅持到中午。

en.content:
Everyone says the first day of a diet is the hardest.
Honestly, the second day is a breeze —

because by the second day, I'm already off it.
en.editorNote: Best posted on a Monday, ideally next to a photo of a giant iced coffee
variations: The best part of my diet plan is that it never lasts three days, so I never get tired of it.
Consistency matters. Sadly, mine only lasts until lunch.

items.sourceNote: 經典「我追隨我的心，它把我帶到冰箱」格式重寫

zh-tw.content:
書上說，要跟隨自己的心。
於是我跟隨了。

它把我一路帶到冰箱前面，還貼心地幫我開了門。
zh-tw.editorNote: 半夜想吃宵夜時的最佳自我開脫，傳給一起墮落的朋友
variations: 我的心很有主見，每次都堅持要往廚房走。
跟著感覺走，感覺說：先吃再說。

en.content:
The books all say: follow your heart.
So I did.

It led me straight to the fridge and held the door open for me.
en.editorNote: The perfect excuse for a midnight snack — send it to the friend you go down with
variations: My heart is very opinionated. It always insists on heading to the kitchen.
I went with my gut. My gut said: eat first, decide later.

items.sourceNote: 經典「減肥第一步買運動鞋，第二步打開外送 App」格式重寫

zh-tw.content:
我的減肥計畫分兩步驟：
第一步，買一雙很貴的慢跑鞋。

第二步，穿著它坐在沙發上點外送。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合貼在新買的運動裝備旁邊，或分享給裝備比運動量多的朋友
variations: 健身房辦了年卡，目前最常用到的功能是門口的體重計。
我買齊了所有健身器材，現在它們是我家最貴的曬衣架。

en.content:
My weight loss plan has two steps.
Step one: buy a very expensive pair of running shoes.

Step two: wear them on the couch while I order takeout.
en.editorNote: Great next to your shiny new gear, or for the friend who owns more equipment than workouts
variations: I got an annual gym membership. So far the feature I use most is the scale by the entrance.
I bought all the home fitness gear. It's now the most expensive laundry rack I own.

items.sourceNote: 經典「我在吃海鮮餐：看到食物就吃」諧音梗重寫

zh-tw.content:
有人問我最近在執行什麼飲食法，
我很認真地回答：目視進食法。

原理很簡單，眼睛看到的，嘴巴就負責處理掉。
zh-tw.editorNote: 在同事問你午餐要吃什麼的時候丟出去，順便決定加點一份炸物
variations: 我的飲食原則只有一條：桌上有的，都算我的份。
營養師問我有沒有忌口，我說有，我忌空盤。

en.content:
Someone asked what diet I'm following these days.
I answered very seriously: the see-it diet.

The rules are simple. Whatever my eyes find, my mouth takes care of.
en.editorNote: Drop it when a coworker asks where to grab lunch, then order the fried side too
variations: My one dietary rule: if it's on the table, it counts as my portion.
The dietitian asked if I avoid anything. I said yes — empty plates.

items.sourceNote: 經典「人生三大幻覺：我還能再吃、明天開始減肥、這次不會胖」格式重寫

zh-tw.content:
人生有三大幻覺：
手機還在震動、這件事等等再處理、還有——這一口不算數。

三個都是假的，只有體重是真的。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在深夜第四塊鹹酥雞下肚後發，配一句「這口真的不算」
variations: 第四大幻覺：只要我沒拍照，這頓就沒發生過。
更新：以上幻覺經體重計實測，全部破功。

en.content:
Life has three great illusions:
my phone just buzzed, I'll deal with that later, and — this bite doesn't count.

All three are fake. Only the scale is real.
en.editorNote: Post it after your fourth piece of fried chicken at midnight, captioned 'this one really doesn't count'
variations: Fourth illusion: if I didn't photograph the meal, it never happened.
Update: all of the above have been fact-checked by the scale and debunked.

items.sourceNote: 經典「減肥沒那麼容易，每塊贅肉都有它的脾氣」歌詞諧仿重寫

zh-tw.content:
減肥沒有那麼容易，
每塊肉都有它的脾氣。

我試著跟它們好好溝通，結果它們決定原地團結，還多找了幾個朋友來。
zh-tw.editorNote: 換季試穿舊褲子卡在大腿時的最佳配文，傳給一起卡住的閨密
variations: 我對它們動之以情、曉之以理，它們回我一句：我們哪也不去。
談判破裂，對方要求先吃飽再說。

en.content:
Losing weight isn't so easy —
every roll of fat has its own temper.

I tried to have a calm talk with them. They responded by holding their ground and inviting a few friends over.
en.editorNote: Perfect caption when last season's jeans get stuck on your thighs — send it to the friend who's stuck too
variations: I appealed to their reason and their emotions. They replied: we're not going anywhere.
Negotiations broke down. The other side demanded a full meal first.

items.sourceNote: 經典「我想要腹肌／我也想要披薩」內心拉扯格式重寫

zh-tw.content:
我：我想要人魚線。
也是我：我想要那塊起司蛋糕。

兩個我坐下來開會，最後一致通過——先吃蛋糕，人魚線下一季再議。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在甜點店猶豫時發，或傳給每次都輸給自己的健身戰友
variations: 內心兩個聲音吵了半天，負責花錢的那個贏了。
會議結論：目標不變，只是無限期延後。

en.content:
Me: I want a six-pack.
Also me: I want that slice of cheesecake.

The two of me sat down for a meeting and reached a unanimous decision — cake first, six-pack revisited next quarter.
en.editorNote: Post it while stalling at the dessert counter, or send it to the gym buddy who keeps losing to themselves
variations: The two voices in my head argued for a while. The one holding the wallet won.
Meeting outcome: the goal stands, just postponed indefinitely.
